chunks.summary: Le petit déjeuner était immense avec énormément de choix pour un petit déjeuner asiatique.
chunks.text:
Le petit déjeuner était immense avec énormément de choix pour un petit déjeuner asiatique. A l’accueil, le personnel était efficace et serviable, ils ont pu nous réserver un tour pour le mont Ijen pour le lendemain et nous préparer un bon petit déjeuner hors des heures. Franchement, il n’y a rien à dire là dessus, c’était parfait ! Le chambre était bien équipée et propre. Le lit était très grand et confortable. La chambre était très très mal insonorisée, du coup on entend la route, les voisins et la mosquée qui se trouve juste à côté. Même avec des boules quies qu’ils nous nous sommes fait réveiller…
Au restaurant, le personnel était très lent, nous avons dû attendre longtemps alors qu’il n’y avait que nous !

chunks.text: Kami menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi selama 3 hari 2 malam untuk liburan sekolah. First impression saya ketika memasuki lobby, dengan ceiling yang tinggi, terkesan adem, simple namun tetap elegan. Lokasi hotel dekat dengan kuliner legendaris dan cafe kekinian, sehingga tidak jauh untuk menikmati pusat kota Banyuwangi. Kebersihan kamar hotel keramahan dan staff yang helpfull membuat kita lebih nyaman. Akan lebih baik lagi apabila sarapan pagi lebih bervariasi. Mungkin krn space yg kurang membuat variasi makanan dan tatanan peletakan cuttleries menjadi terbatas. Terima kasih Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi 🫰🏼

Sedikit masukan untuk welcome drink, sepertinya jauh lebih nyaman untuk pengunjung baru datang langsung dikasih minum sambil menunggu check-in, bukan dikasih voucher dan ditukar ke lantai 16. Karna terkadang kita menginap di hotel yang menyambut kita dengan hangat itu jauh lebih berkesan. Fun fact, karna perjalanan menuju ke BW dari luar kota itu jauuuh, jadi ketika disambut lebih hangat itu jauh lebih berkesan.

chunks.summary: The hotel is great, and the family room is spacious enough for four people.
chunks.text: The hotel is great, and the family room is spacious enough for four people. Room service was excellent and prompt. Both the room and the toilet were spotlessly clean. However, dining at the 3rd-floor Ijen Restaurant was a letdown; we only ordered HK fried rice and rawon, but it took an hour to be served. Worse, the rawon broth wasn't hot enough, and the salted egg was served straight from the fridge. While the rawon itself was mediocre, the HK fried rice was quite tasty. Overall, it was a good stay, but stay away from the restaurant. Modern fitness center. Modern fitness center.

chunks.summary: I recently stayed at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi and overall had a good experience.
chunks.text: I recently stayed at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi and overall had a good experience. What I liked: • The hotel is relatively clean and well maintained. • The room was clean, comfortable, the balcony is clean and well maintained • Breakfast offered a decent variety of choices. • Check-in and check-out processes were efficient and fast. • The parking area was spacious, well-lit, and convenient. What could be improved: • When I came for breakfast around 9:00 AM, many food items had already run out. • Refill requests were not handled promptly; some items took more than 15 minutes to be replenished. • In several situations, the service felt overly focused on SOPs rather than guest experience and flexibility. Examples include the one-plate borrowing policy, child policy implementation, and all drinking water being chargeable. Overall, this is a good hotel with solid facilities. However, at a room rate exceeding IDR 1 million per night, I would expect a higher level of service, responsiveness, and hospitality.

pelayanan yang sangat memuaskan bisa stay di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi, menginap di lantai 12 dengan view langsung selat bali, hotel tertinggi dibanyuwangi , makanan breakfast sangat enakk, Nasi goreng tek tek sangat lezat. chunks.text: Nice clean room with beautiful mountain view. Snack and water provided on arrival with water bottle replenish everyday. Very nice selection of breakfast items at the restaurant.

chunks.summary: Beautiful hotel with excellent rooms.
chunks.text: Beautiful hotel with excellent rooms. The bed was good, the staff excellent. Diner was very nice and breakfast excellent. Disappointed points, no warm water and the biggest one, i had to pay for a cappucino at breakfast. I stayed this trip in 6 others hotels and never had to pay for a cappuciono at breakfast. For me it's not the money but this should be part of the service at breakfast.

chunks.summary: Sangat puas menginap di hotel ini.
chunks.text: Sangat puas menginap di hotel ini. Pelayanannya profesional, kamar luas dan bersih, serta fasilitas yang tersedia berfungsi dengan baik. Pasti akan memilih menginap di sini lagi saat berkunjung.

chunks.text: Menginap di sini sangat nyaman. Kamarnya bersih, tempat tidur empuk, dan suasananya tenang sehingga bisa beristirahat dengan maksimal. Pelayanan staf juga ramah dan membuat tamu merasa disambut dengan baik.

chunks.summary: Very clean and comfortable hotel with all the amenities needed for a pleasant stay.
chunks.text: Very clean and comfortable hotel with all the amenities needed for a pleasant stay. The staff was always friendly, welcoming, and helpful. Everything was well organized and maintained. Overall, a great experience and a place I would happily stay at again. Highly recommended!

1. all staffs are very helpful
2. clean hotel
3. suggestion:
a. variant of bf menu: seems menu is changed every 2 days, but almost similar. If you stayed for more than 2 days then it would be not convenient
b. roof top lounge is very nice, good food, but service takes time. If you are not in the hurry & want to enjoy sunset, it would be perfect
c. spa must be upgraded. Therapists are not professional, talking each other, not good massage

chunks.summary: All I just can say that this hotel meets our expectations.
chunks.text:
All I just can say that this hotel meets our expectations. Kokoon is like our second home in Banyuwangi
Luxury meets elegance.. Their staffs were very friendly and helpful during our stay. The breakfast was served in so many variance and so tasty, they have a salad bar with six choices of dressing. The room was so comfortable and clean. If you stay in Kokoon, do not forget to spend your time at their rooftop. The food was great, we ordered chicken drum, beef burger, and truffle fries 🍟 Luv it 💛

Thank you Kokoon, we’ll be back to you soon💛

chunks.text: Menginap di sini bareng keluarga sangat memuaskan. Hotelnya modern dan estetik. Kamarnya nyaman banget, dan serunya bisa lihat view laut dari jendela. Nilai plus banget buat kolam renang indoor-nya dan ada permainan seru seperti mesin arkade di dekat restoran. Menu sarapannya juara, variasinya banyak dan ada jamu tradisionalnya juga. Definately will come back

chunks.text: First time stayed at Kokoon Bwi. Had a great stay. Very fast & smooth ci and co process. Sure will be back next time!

chunks.summary: Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr.
chunks.text: Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr. Sony" — signed personally by GM Weni Kristanti. That personal touch alone already made us smile. Brought the whole family here and the rooftop became our favorite spot. Sunrise magic — the Bali Strait glowing in gold and orange, with Bali's silhouette emerging on the horizon. The kids were so excited capturing every angle, snapping photos non-stop, and just soaking in the moment. Seeing them that happy made the whole trip worthwhile. Breakfast with that mountain panorama as the backdrop, savoring a rich spread of Indonesian cuisine — it was the perfect way to start the morning. Cheerful, warm, and deeply satisfying. Staff throughout — warm, attentive, personal.

chunks.summary: Location is about half an hour from the ferry crossing to Bali so it offered beautiful views of the sunrise over Bali to the east from our room as well as breathtaking views of the rise paddies and mountains to the west as we enjoyed breakfast.
chunks.text: Location is about half an hour from the ferry crossing to Bali so it offered beautiful views of the sunrise over Bali to the east from our room as well as breathtaking views of the rise paddies and mountains to the west as we enjoyed breakfast. The staff were extremely helpful with storing some of our frozen food, getting us a bucket of ice. The receptionist was very helpful in showing us the room before deciding to check in and was very friendly and polite. Room was very clean with fresh bedding and white fluffy towels. Water pressure very, very good...everything working. Price was very reasonable considering the very long holidays. Overall the hotel was very nice, clean, comfortable..

chunks.summary: Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr.
chunks.text: Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr. Sony" — signed personally by GM Weni Kristanti. That personal touch alone already made us smile. Brought the whole family here and the rooftop became our favorite spot. Sunrise magic — the Bali Strait glowing in gold and orange, with Bali's silhouette emerging on the horizon. The kids were so excited capturing every angle, snapping photos non-stop, and just soaking in the moment. Seeing them that happy made the whole trip worthwhile. Breakfast with that mountain panorama as the backdrop, savoring a rich spread of Indonesian cuisine — it was the perfect way to start the morning. Cheerful, warm, and deeply satisfying. Staff throughout — warm, attentive, personal. Never intrusive.

chunks.summary: My recent stay at the Kokoon Hotel in Banyuwangi was nothing short of exceptional.
chunks.text: My recent stay at the Kokoon Hotel in Banyuwangi was nothing short of exceptional. The property boasts a striking and sophisticated design, seamlessly blending modern elegance with absolute comfort. Staying on a higher floor provided a breathtaking, panoramic view that served as the perfect backdrop to a relaxing getaway. The morning breakfast was a wonderfully comforting affair, made even more memorable by the delightful addition of a dedicated Indomie stand—a charming and uniquely Indonesian touch that brought a sense of familiar warmth to the excellent morning spread. I highly recommend this beautiful hotel to anyone seeking a refined and thoroughly enjoyable stay in Banyuwangi.

What makes it special is that there is a Starbucks in the lobby—not a regular outlet, but they serve selected Starbucks menu items, with baristas who are directly trained by Starbucks. One staff member and barista named Dimas was very informative and humble in introducing tourist attractions in Banyuwangi. Highly recommended to stay at this hotel.

chunks.summary: Menginap di hotel 3 malam..
chunks.text: Menginap di hotel 3 malam.. ternyata masih nyaman banget jadi kita extend lagi 2 malam total 5 malam. Selalu happy nginep di Kokoon kayanya ini udah ketiga kali 🥰 Mama saya asli banyuwangi tp karena sudah tidak ada orang tua jd ngga ada rumah lagi disini. Tadi malam di tawarin menu tambahan biar ngga bosan selama breakfast disini, pelayanannya best banget 👍🏻👍🏻 recommend untuk yg mau liburan di banyuwangi bisa menginap disini 🫶🏻🫶🏻 terus karena bawa mobil listrik jd butuh chargernya dan disini sudah ada wall charging yg berbayar atau bisa juga pakai charger bawaan free. Kamar juga nyaman dan modern lokasi strategis

tentu tidak selesai acara (H+1)cuman bisa minta maaf lah sudah salah kedaden mau apa? mau 1000 maaf pun gak akan bisa mengobati hari H yg kacau ada saudara dari salah 1 meja yg berani complain ke waitress nya dan di bawakan lagi dari dalam dapur, seharusnya apa yang saya pesan harus di sajikan semua di hadapan tamu kenapa tunggu tamu complain? kamu mau makan semua makanan yg kamu sembunyikan di dapur??? itu baru 1 meja gak semua tamu berani complain di tempat adanya ya setelah acara ada juga meja yang masi ada sisanya di kasih ke meja lain? waitress kalian yg kurang pelatihan / gimana sih? atau dapur yg tidak bisa membagi sama rata? sudah tau 1 meja isi 12 ya sajikan 12 porsi!! setiap meja beda complain an nilai yang kamu sajikan tidak ada 1/4 dari yang saya bayarkan lalu apa gunanya test food test food doang bagus hari H buruk pada saat test food bilang “siap siap siap” mana siap mu? hilang kemana? di makan udangnya? bayangkan kamu makan di undangan orang cuman di sajikan 1 udang 1 brokoli 1 slice ikan, air sirup???? mau? sok monggo cobain di resto kalian sendiri lalu nanti pasti cuman akan di balas “ Salam Hangat dari Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi Mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang Bapak/Ibu rasakan dan alami. Adapun kritik yang diberikan akan menjadi perhatian kami kedepannya. Fasilitas dan pelayanan tamu menjadi bagian fokus utama yang terus kami tingkatkan untuk memberikan kepuasan yang maksimal bagi semua tamu.

chunks.summary: “ ah basiii mau di kritik 1000x pun kalian tetep begitu pasti yang penting uang masuk kan?
chunks.text: “ ah basiii mau di kritik 1000x pun kalian tetep begitu pasti yang penting uang masuk kan? urusan jelek bodo amat 200++ tamu sudah kamu kecewakan dalam 1 malam even minta maaf ke tamu pun tidak ada pada saat tamu checkout pun complain ke reception jg gaada laporan ke saya dan tidak ada tindak lanjutnya sampai saya yg harus mendengar sendiri dari keluarga besar percuma juga kamu minta review makan ke meja VIP (keluarga inti) kamu kasi kita udang nya 3 ya enak enak aja lah tamu kita? yang kamu gak kasi makan gak di mintain review di kertas? sama aja bohong masi banyak sekali unek unek saya yg belom keluar cmn bisa geleng geleng kepala elus dada nge batin saya dan ortu udah percaya ke kokoon tapi balasan kalian begitu tidak pantas sekali

chunks.summary: Beberapa hari lalu kami menginap di sini karena ada undangan resepsi pernikahan saudara di sini juga.
chunks.text: Beberapa hari lalu kami menginap di sini karena ada undangan resepsi pernikahan saudara di sini juga. Untuk sekedar menginap oke, namun tidak rekomen utk acara resepsi. Sangat disayangkan keindahan gedung hotel tercoreng oleh service banquet yg cukup fatal. Mungkin SDM kitchen/ resto termasuk waiter belum siap dengan konsep sitting dinner. Porsinya amat sangat sedikit (tidak wajar untuk restoran/ hotel manapun dengan konsep sitting dinner Chinese wedding style). Sebagai gambaran takaran perorang: nasi goreng = 1,5sdm diplating di piring besar, sup berisi setengah mangkuk kecil, udang goreng 1 potong, dsb. Sayang kami tidak memfoto porsiannya, namun setelah resepsi ternyata hampir semua saudara & rekan di meja lain mengalami hal yg sama. Bahkan tamu senior di meja lain yang bahkan biasanya makannya sedikit setelah resepsi masih merasa lapar. 2. Waiter tdk membagi dengan pas sehingga sering ada sisa setelah dia membagi ke masing2 plate, dan sisa makanan tidak dibagikan lagi melainkan ditaruh di nampan piring2 kotor dan tdk lama diangkut keluar. Kasihan kedua mempelai yang sudah mempercayakan hari bahagianya pada hotel ini utk menjamu para undangan dengan baik malah dikecewakan.

chunks.summary: Kesan pertama WoW..
chunks.text: Kesan pertama WoW.. tapi ternyata ga se wow itu.. Yg pertama,saya datang diundang oleh saudara saya yg kebetulan menginap disana, dan kita duduk di restoran. Setelah order menunggu hampir 1jam baru dikabarin kalau makanan kosong.. setelah diganti pun tak kunjung datang dan akhirnya kita membatalkan orderan setelah kurang lebih 2 jam duduk manis tanpa keluar satupun makanan atau minuman.. Yang Kedua saat acara undangan saudara juga, saya sudah ber ekspektasi makanan akan wow karena harga juga tidak murah untuk di banyuwangi.. tapi ternyata sangat mengecewakan pulang dari pesta kami masi merasa lapar dan ternyata hampir sebagian tamu begitu.. tolong kalau tidak pernah menyajikan untuk pesta meja bisa terima dari vendor lain yg lebih berpengalaman, karena pesta pernikahan bukan hal yang main2 dan penyelenggara pasti ingin memberikan yang terbaik untuk tamu yg hadir jauh dan telah memberikan waktu untuk bisa datang.. sekian..

chunks.summary: Datang sebagai tamu undangan wedding di Kokoon Hotel, sebenarnya saya tidak mau komplain pada hari H krn tidak ingin mengecewakan pengantin, tetapi ternyata setelah acara banyak tamu lain yang merasakan hal yg sama..
chunks.text: Datang sebagai tamu undangan wedding di Kokoon Hotel, sebenarnya saya tidak mau komplain pada hari H krn tidak ingin mengecewakan pengantin, tetapi ternyata setelah acara banyak tamu lain yang merasakan hal yg sama.. Rasa makanan cukup OK tapi porsi dan pelayanan yg kurang layak. Makanan diserving di piring kita oleh waiter sehingga kita tidak bisa melihat porsi yang sebenarnya, tetapi bahkan setelah dibagi dalam porsi kecil, sisa makanan di nampan tidak dibagikan habis malah dibawa waiter ke meja serving. Hanya 1x dalam sekian course makanan yaitu udang goreng yg sisanya ditaruh di meja, tetapi menu lain tdk disajikan sisanya sama sekali. Waktu menu sapo ayam brokoli yg disajikan di piring saya yg terakhir, hanya potongan sayurnya, padahal di nampan masih ada potongan ayam tetapi tidak disajikan di piring terakhir malah disisakan di nampan dan dibawa ke meja serving waiter lalu dicleanup.

chunks.summary: Had an event here and it was chaos.
chunks.text: Had an event here and it was chaos. We paid for the whole thing in full without any negotiations, but they still slacked. The food took so long to come out (about 1 hour ++) for an event where the food was already ordered/predetermined since more than 1 month ago. And when the food came out, it was already cold and in such small portions. Such small portions in fact that some guest of mine only got 1 shrimp per plate (they were supposed to get 2-3). Ridiculous. The price itself was not cheap. Their delivery was not as what was discussed beforehand in the technical meeting. When we brought it up with the server, their response was only "Please Wait" with an unapologetic look. Not to mention the room. When I had first came into the room, the tissue box looked like it had mold growing on it.

chunks.summary: Sy selaku saudara dari pemilik acara) Kemarin ada acara pernikahan di Kokoon.
chunks.text: Sy selaku saudara dari pemilik acara) Kemarin ada acara pernikahan di Kokoon. Service makanan saat acara sangat buruk. Di perjanjian awal makanan yg disajikan untuk per table. 1 table isi 12 orang, tapi makanan hanya secuil. Makanan yg hanya untuk 7org, di served untuk 12org. Terlalu lama untuk serving makanannya. Bukan hanya 1 meja, tapi banyak. Yg makanannya berlimpah hanya meja VIP. Salah satunya, saat food testing sudah di info untuk served udang 3 pcs, tapi di acara hanya dapat 1pcs. Nasi gorengnya malah keluar terakhir dan lama sekali. Pihak hotel di protes tidak ada tanggapan yang memuaskan. Sungguh buruk.

Jgn cm pas test food / meja vip ok, meja tamu BigNo. Kasian malunya pengantinnya kyk apa, niat hati menjamu tamu2 dg bayar mahal + enak, malah zonk 😭

chunks.summary: Aku kemarin menginap di Kokon Hotel Banyuwangi dan overall pengalamannya cukup menyenangkan.
chunks.text: Aku kemarin menginap di Kokon Hotel Banyuwangi dan overall pengalamannya cukup menyenangkan. Begitu sampai, suasananya langsung terasa tenang dan modern, kamarnya juga bersih, rapi, dan nyaman buat istirahat. Stafnya ramah dan cepat bantu kalau ada kebutuhan, jadi bikin betah. Lokasinya menurutku cukup strategis untuk keliling Banyuwangi, walaupun nggak persis di tengah kota. Dengan harga yang ditawarkan, menurutku hotel ini worth it banget, apalagi kalau cari tempat menginap yang simpel tapi tetap nyaman.

chunks.summary: The staff are very friendly.
chunks.text: The staff are very friendly. Got 2 welcome drink vouchers for the family room. Breakfast is okay. There's an EV charging point on the basement parking. The weak point is the location that is pretty far from Banyuwangi proper, by pretty far, I mean you won't want to walk and explore by foot, so it's either private vehicle or online taxi. Other than that, it's a great place to stay at.

chunks.summary: We had an amazing stay at this hotel!
chunks.text: We had an amazing stay at this hotel! The service was absolutely excellent - the staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and made us feel very welcome. It was the perfect place to relax after climbing Mount Ijen. Honestly, it was the best experience we could have asked for after such an intense trip. Everything was comfortable, clean, and thoughtfully arranged. Highly recommend this hotel if you're visiting the area!

chunks.summary: Saya ingin menyampaikan komplain serius terkait pengalaman saya yang sangat mengecewakan selama menginap dan menggunakan layanan di restoran rooftop Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Saya ingin menyampaikan komplain serius terkait pengalaman saya yang sangat mengecewakan selama menginap dan menggunakan layanan di restoran rooftop Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Saat makan malam di rooftop, saya memesan dua menu, namun yang datang hanya satu. Satu menu lainnya tidak kunjung datang dengan waktu tunggu yang sangat lama hingga akhirnya saya memutuskan untuk membatalkannya. Hal ini tentu sangat mengganggu pengalaman makan malam saya. Tidak hanya itu, pada malam harinya saya memesan room service, namun pesanan baru datang setelah kurang lebih satu jam. Ketika saya melakukan follow up, staf hanya memberikan alasan bahwa kondisi sedang ramai dan pesanan diproses sesuai antrean. Sebagai tamu, saya memahami jika kondisi sedang ramai. Namun yang sangat disayangkan adalah tidak adanya komunikasi yang jelas dari pihak staf. Seharusnya pihak hotel dapat memberikan estimasi waktu tunggu sejak awal, serta melakukan konfirmasi kepada tamu apakah bersedia menunggu atau tidak. Kurangnya inisiatif untuk menghubungi dan memberikan update kepada tamu menunjukkan standar pelayanan yang tidak profesional, terutama untuk sekelas hotel. Saya merasa sangat kecewa karena pelayanan yang saya terima tidak sebanding dengan biaya yang saya keluarkan, termasuk pajak dan service charge yang seharusnya mencerminkan kualitas layanan yang baik. Saya berharap pihak manajemen dapat mengevaluasi dan memperbaiki kualitas pelayanan agar kejadian seperti ini tidak terulang kembali kepada tamu lainnya.

chunks.summary: Stayed for a quick holiday in Junior Suite, got lots of freebies and the hotel’s facilities are exceptional 🫶 they have sauna, water dispenser with disposable cups, wide changing space with lots of seatings and power sockets inside the locker room.
chunks.text: Stayed for a quick holiday in Junior Suite, got lots of freebies and the hotel’s facilities are exceptional 🫶 they have sauna, water dispenser with disposable cups, wide changing space with lots of seatings and power sockets inside the locker room. Probably the best changing room I’ve ever found in a hotel, even compared to 5-stars ones. The pool and gym are also good, observation deck (rooftop) is magical 🫶

Karena kami booking via web hotel, dapat free drink di rooftop, 1 cup Starbucks dan dapat free pizza (entah karena booking via web atau memang sedang promo). Yang bisa ditingkatkan lagi mungkin makanan untuk breakfast karena rasanya terlalu biasa. Sukses terus Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: Stayed at this 4-star hotel and was impressed from the moment I arrived.
chunks.text: Stayed at this 4-star hotel and was impressed from the moment I arrived. The room was spotless, modern, and felt very new, with everything in perfect working order. I was lucky to enjoy an incredible view – either the sunrise over the sea or the stunning backdrop of three volcanic mountains, both truly memorable and worth waking up early for. The staff were consistently helpful and friendly, quick to assist with any request and always greeting me with a smile. Overall, a very comfortable and relaxing stay, and I would happily return and recommend this hotel to anyone visiting the area.

chunks.summary: We recently stayed at this hotel as a family of 2 adults and 2 kids (5 and 3 years old).
chunks.text: We recently stayed at this hotel as a family of 2 adults and 2 kids (5 and 3 years old). Overall, we had a mixed experience. We arrived at 14.00, but unfortunately our room was not ready yet and we had to wait about 15–20 minutes before we could check in. It wasn’t a long wait, but after traveling with kids, it would have been nicer if the room had been ready on time. The room itself was spacious and comfortable, and the bathroom water pressure worked well. We also ordered pizza from room service and it was delicious. Dinner was supposed to be ready at 19.00, but it was only ready around 19.30. However, the food was top notch and the lounge staff were very helpful and friendly. We booked the room with an extra bed including breakfast, and we had already reconfirmed that breakfast was included for all of us. However, at the breakfast restaurant, the hostess initially told us we needed to pay extra. After we went to the cashier, another staff member confirmed that it was already settled. This kind of miscommunication was a bit disappointing. Another issue happened during breakfast. We ordered 2 iced Americanos. The menu stated IDR 25,000 per glass (with additional tax & service), which we understood. However, when the bill came, the total was IDR 90,000. When we asked why, we were told that one iced Americano was IDR 45,000 including tax & service, and that there was an additional charge for the ice. Charging IDR 20,000 for ice felt unreasonable. Although we paid the full amount, this situation affected our mood and we decided to leave right after breakfast. Additionally, the air conditioning in the hallway near the kids’ playroom was not working in the afternoon, making it quite hot while the kids were playing. On a positive note, the check-out process was fast and efficient. The room and facilities are actually very good, but the restaurant staff—especially at breakfast—may need better communication and training. It’s unfortunate because small miscommunications can significantly affect guests’ overall experience. With some improvements in service consistency, this hotel could offer a much better overall stay.

chunks.text: Hotel nyaman yang kami tempati di Banyuwangi, Aromanya begitu masuk, ihhhhh wanginya itu menenangkan. Seperti bau jahe, sere, tapi wangi. Welcome drinknya starbucks😍 utk 2 orang. Bebas pilih minuman. Mantab kan? Kamarnya super bersih, Kami ambil family room Super worth it Walau ukuran kamar mandinya compact. Kamar tidurnya luas Sarapannya enak dan bervariasi Tapi yg paling enak onde² pandannya Menyesal banget krn udah kenyang, cm bsa makan onde² sedikit. Jangan lewatkan onde² ketika sarapan. Ada kids activity room Ada kolam renang dan spa juga Ada view deck yang bisa lihat kota Banyuwangi dari atas. Lokasinya 5-10 menit dr pusat kota. 45 menit ke djawatan. Terimakasih utk pelayanannya Kokoon We'll be back soon.

chunks.summary: I stay here for a few days every month.
chunks.text: I stay here for a few days every month. Each time it’s a seamless experience. Fast check in, nice modern spacious room, great gym, awesome breakfast. All staff are friendly, customer service oriented. Adam, a manager in the breakfast/dining area is always particularly attentive and kind. For my work travels this place hits or exceeds the mark every time.

chunks.summary: Menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi bersama keluarga menjadi pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan.
chunks.text: Menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi bersama keluarga menjadi pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan. Sejak tiba, kami langsung merasakan suasana hotel yang bersih, modern, dan tertata rapi. Proses check-in berlangsung cepat dengan pelayanan staf yang ramah, membuat kami merasa disambut dengan baik. Kamar yang kami tempati cukup luas dan cocok untuk keluarga. Dari kamar, kami dapat menikmati pemandangan Selat Bali di satu sisi dan Gunung Ijen di sisi lainnya, menghadirkan suasana khas Banyuwangi yang menenangkan. Tempat tidurnya pun empuk, ruangan bersih, dan suasananya tenang sehingga cocok untuk beristirahat setelah seharian beraktivitas. Anak-anak terlihat senang karena kamar terasa lega dan nyaman untuk bergerak. Salah satu fasilitas favorit kami adalah kolam renang indoor. Area kolamnya bersih dan nyaman, sehingga anak-anak bisa berenang dengan aman tanpa terganggu panas atau hujan. Sementara mereka bermain air, kami bisa bersantai di sekitar kolam atau menikmati waktu relaksasi di spa hotel. Fasilitas gym yang lengkap dan area yoga juga memberi kesempatan bagi kami untuk tetap berolahraga dan menyegarkan tubuh selama liburan. Di pagi hari, sarapan menjadi momen kebersamaan yang menyenangkan. Pilihan menu cukup beragam, mulai dari hidangan khas Indonesia hingga menu favorit anak-anak, dengan rasa yang lezat dan penyajian yang rapi. Secara keseluruhan, Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi memberikan pengalaman menginap yang nyaman, aman, dan ramah keluarga, menjadikannya pilihan yang tepat untuk liburan keluarga di Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: If Google had more than 5 stars, this place would be a solid 10/10.
chunks.text: If Google had more than 5 stars, this place would be a solid 10/10. The team is super solid—from security to FO, bellboy, Tabuhan Lounge, housekeeping, room service, even gym attendance; Everyone’s genuinely warm and helpful. Great vibes, great service, and a truly welcoming stay. From the moment I arrive, I'm welcomed warmly. Throughout the stay, everything is handled with maximum helpfulness, and I leave feeling truly satisfied. It’s not just friendly service—it’s sincere care. Luvvv yuuuuu, Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi! ⭐️✨

chunks.text: My first experience staying at the Kokoon Hotel in Banyuwangi was very pleasant. The service was friendly and prompt, from the front desk and restaurant staff to housekeeping. The pool view was also stunning, with its mountain views. The rooms were clean and fragrant.

chunks.summary:
Review untuk Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan.
chunks.text:
Review untuk Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Kamarnya luas dan bersih, dengan kamar mandi yang juga luas serta dilengkapi handuk kecil tambahan, yang cukup jarang ditemukan dan sangat membantu. Fasilitas hotel tergolong lengkap, termasuk swimming pool indoor yang nyaman dan observatory dock dengan pemandangan yang sangat bagus. Area parkir luas, sehingga tidak menyulitkan tamu yang membawa kendaraan. Untuk makanan, kualitasnya enak dengan pilihan menu yang bervariasi. Pelayanan juga menjadi nilai tambah, karena seluruh pegawai ramah dan membantu. Untuk kekurangan, sebenarnya tidak ada hal yang signifikan. Semuanya sudah baik, hanya kopinya saja yang menurut saya masih bisa ditingkatkan 😊. Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini sangat layak direkomendasikan untuk perjalanan bisnis maupun liburan.

chunks.summary: Pengalaman kami menginap disini untuk pertama kalinya di hotel ini, setelah menempuh perjalanan jauh sangat berkesan, kami late check in di hotel jam 21.30 WIB, dari awal ketibaan di hotel disambut dengan sekurity  yg ramah, quick check in, hotelnya masih terbilang baru, bersih, kamarnya pun bersih, showernya pun ok, toiletnya pun ok, kamar mandi ok saluran airnya berfungsi dgn baik, Ac kamarnya pun dingin, kamarnya luas, pelayanan hotelnya pun ramah dari segi makanan bervariasi banyak pilihan, ada menu ramah anak juga, rasanya pun ok, oh iya untuk sarapan itu berbayar kebetulan anak saya umur 9 tahun jadi dikenakan charger Rp 100.000, 00, (ada batasan umur).
chunks.text:
Pengalaman kami menginap disini untuk pertama kalinya di hotel ini, setelah menempuh perjalanan jauh sangat berkesan, kami late check in di hotel jam 21.30 WIB, dari awal ketibaan di hotel disambut dengan sekurity  yg ramah, quick check in, hotelnya masih terbilang baru, bersih, kamarnya pun bersih, showernya pun ok, toiletnya pun ok, kamar mandi ok saluran airnya berfungsi dgn baik, Ac kamarnya pun dingin, kamarnya luas, pelayanan hotelnya pun ramah dari segi makanan bervariasi banyak pilihan, ada menu ramah anak juga, rasanya pun ok, oh iya untuk sarapan itu berbayar kebetulan anak saya umur 9 tahun jadi dikenakan charger Rp 100.000, 00, (ada batasan umur). Overall menginap disini Ok, mdh2an ketika ke Banyuwangi lg, kami akan balik lg menginap disini 🤭
Semoga hotel kokoon bisa mempertahankan apa yg baik dan bagus baik dari segi pelayanan, keramahan, kebersihan, dan kualitas rasa makanan .. sukses selalu hotel kokoon ..

chunks.text: Pengalaman pertama menginap di Kokoon. Disambut dengan sangat ramah oleh concierge dan receiption, pdhl waktu itu kami datang dalam rombongan. Begitu sampai kamar, tnyt suasana dan kamarnya telah dipersiapkan dengan sangat baik (oleh Mas Zacky), sehingga sy merasa sangat nyaman. Bener2 feels like home. Pilihan breakfast nya juga cukup variatif, dan rasanya enak, terutama onde-ondenya (THE BEST!!!). Perbaikan yg masih bs dilakukan mgkn keramahan dari kasir resto, krn sy merasa kmrn mas kasir restonya ramah siy... tapi agak kurang helpful. Tp overall sy senang dan puas menginap dsana, walaupun cuma 1 malam.

chunks.text: Very nice hotel. The room is very comfortable with warm ambience & the food taste good. The staff are very friendly and helpful

chunks.summary: This is the best hotel in town for family of 4 or 5.
chunks.text: This is the best hotel in town for family of 4 or 5. Large room, spacious bathroom, 2 king beds, and still have a sofa, wide window with mountains view, that is more than of what you will be expected. For breakfast, the variety of foods and taste are sufficient for me. Suggestion maybe better if you can place sausages into the main tables together with main menu of rices, instead of in the omelet counter. I love the traditional cakes so much. The indoor pool is excellent for me since you wouldnt need to worry about weather, and also open until late night.

chunks.text: Hotel yg nyaman, modern simple very neat, bahkan tangga exit nya pun sangat bersih. Saya membiasakan diri menggunakan tangga utk naik turun di gedung bertingkat. Hotel Kokoon memperhatikan kebersihan bahkan pd lokasi yg hampir tidak tersentuh pengunjung. Salut. Tersedia rooftop dg pemandangan laut dan gunung yg menyegarkan. Tampaknya tangga kayu perlu renovasi segera. Pelayanan prima, ramah dan helpfull. Menu sarapan bervariasi dan enak shg tdk bosan meski menginap berhari2... Sukses terus Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi, terus berikan yg terbaik bagi konsumen :)

Mohon diperhatikan untuk lantai kamar mandi terlalu licin saat terkena air, kemungkinan penggunaan pembersih lantainya yg terlalu banyak.

chunks.summary: I would like to sincerely thank the Kokoon Hotel team for their care and professionalism.
chunks.text: I would like to sincerely thank the Kokoon Hotel team for their care and professionalism. As a wellness member, Kokoon Hotel has always felt like a second home for me. My mother and my friend also love stayed here. (Also, thanks to Mas Fahmi for helping my mom some time ago). Today, I had a small accident in the changing room and cut my finger while cleaning up. When I reported it, Mbak Aini at the reception showed genuine concern, immediately checking on my condition and offering help. She then coordinated with Mas Emmo, who kindly cleaned my wound and provided first aid. I truly appreciate the calm, attentive, and caring response from the Kokoon team. I will definitely continue recommending Kokoon Hotel to my friends and my colleagues who visiting Banyuwangi. Warm regards, MT

chunks.summary: While the hotel is fine..
chunks.text: While the hotel is fine.. I asked for a driver to airport in Bali. It took 8 hrs and that didn’t include time change. Very disappointed with hotel in this regard.

chunks.summary: Pernah mengalami hal tidak mengenakkan karena hampir salah ambil rute pintu keluar parkir, lalu di teriaki, dibentak dan dipelototi oleh petugas keamanan atau apalah yang ada di bawah, menurut saya itu hal yang fatal untuk pelayanan hotel sekelas kokoon.
chunks.text: Pernah mengalami hal tidak mengenakkan karena hampir salah ambil rute pintu keluar parkir, lalu di teriaki, dibentak dan dipelototi oleh petugas keamanan atau apalah yang ada di bawah, menurut saya itu hal yang fatal untuk pelayanan hotel sekelas kokoon. Dia menunjukkan kemarahan dan sangat tidak ramah, ketika saya minta maaf pun dia tidak merespon, dan tetap dengan ekspresi marah dan melotot. Pengalaman pertama kesana dan langsung sakit hati, dan tidak akan kesana lagi dalam urusan apapun.

chunks.text: wir waren schon öfters in diesem Hotel und waren jedes Mal sehr zufrieden. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis ist erstklassig und die Leute sind freundlich und der Service ist sehr gut. Das gilt sowohl für die Massage, den Swimmingpool, die Laundry und auch für den Zimmerservice. Es gibt nicht viel zu bemängeln. Vielleicht, dass die Schränke etwas klein sind. Außerdem hatte ich bei dem Zimmerservice mal eine Pizza bestellt, die nicht wirklich wie eine Pizza vergleichbar ist, wie man sie allgemein kennt. Abgesehen davon gibt es nichts zu meckern.

chunks.summary: KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel.
chunks.text: KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel. Turned out to be a great choice. The room was comfy, but what really surprised me was the spa super relaxing and the price was honestly really good for the quality. Exactly what you need after a long trip. And I have to mention RIFA, the barista. She’s incredibly friendly and genuinely hospitable. The kind of service that instantly puts you in a good mood. She made me feel so welcome that I almost wanted to extend my stay 😁 If you’re passing through Banyuwangi, this place is definitely worth considering my unplanned stop ended up feeling like a mini getaway.

KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop

I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel.
chunks.text:
KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop

I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel. Turned out to be a great choice. The room was comfy, but what really surprised me was the spa super relaxing and the price was honestly really good for the quality. Exactly what you need after a long trip. And I have to mention RIFA, the barista. She’s incredibly friendly and genuinely hospitable. The kind of service that instantly puts you in a good mood. She made me feel so welcome that I almost wanted to extend my stay 😁

If you’re passing through Banyuwangi, this place is definitely worth considering  my unplanned stop ended up feeling like a mini getaway.

chunks.summary:
- way above my expectations, a really beautiful hotel 
- smells soooo nice in the lobby, they must spray lemongrass from the ceiling or something, you kinda want to sit there and chilll
- beautiful rooms, spacious, comfortable, Netflix on tv, great WiFi
- modern toilet and showers
- professional and welcoming staff
- there are two restaurants, including a steak one, a bar in the rooftop, and a Starbucks in ground floor
- beautiful views of the coconut trees jungle and the sea from the top.
chunks.text:
- way above my expectations, a really beautiful hotel 
- smells soooo nice in the lobby, they must spray lemongrass from the ceiling or something, you kinda want to sit there and chilll
- beautiful rooms, spacious, comfortable, Netflix on tv, great WiFi
- modern toilet and showers
- professional and welcoming staff
- there are two restaurants, including a steak one, a bar in the rooftop, and a Starbucks in ground floor
- beautiful views of the coconut trees jungle and the sea from the top. - location is a bit far from the ferry and the town centre
- they wouldn’t deliver gofood to the room, and you must go down and pick it up yourself. In some ways I understand it, but idk, other hotels just deliver to the room

chunks.summary: Menginap di Kokoon Hotel merupakan salah satu pilihan terbaik.
chunks.text: Menginap di Kokoon Hotel merupakan salah satu pilihan terbaik. Kamarnya bersih banget, rapi, Interiornya oke, tempat tidurnya empuk, AC dingin, dan pencahayaannya pas banget cocok buat istirahat. Kamar mandinya juga bersih dan lengkap, ada air panas yang lancar dan amenitiesnya komplit. Special thanks untuk Mas David dan tim, super ramah dan helpful dari awal check-in sampai check-out. Mereka bener-bener sigap bantuin kalau kita butuh sesuatu, dan selalu senyum. Untuk breakfast, Variannya banyak dan enak-enak. Ada makanan lokal juga yang rasanya mantap teritama Bakmi Gorengnya, plus beberapa pilihan western food. Tempat makannya juga nyaman banget. Pokoknya puas banget nginep di sini, dan pastinya bakal balik lagi kalau ke kota Banyuwangi lagi. Highly recommended buat yang cari penginapan nyaman dengan pelayanan top!

chunks.summary: My trip this time, with my big fams.
chunks.text: My trip this time, with my big fams. But as always I’d never get disappointed with this hotel’s service… when i came to Banyuwangi, i alwys stay in Kokoon hotel. It’s felt like home, so good and so comfortable. They’ve big room with big bed, so comfy n clean, and with their bathroom too. Their food so yummy n delicious, i highly recommend their Pizza Meat Lovers, for indonesians cuisine I recommend Rawon Iga n Nasi tempong Ayam. Trust me you’ll never get disappointed. See you again kokoon, I’ll be back soon…

chunks.summary: Wir waren 6 Wochen geschäftlich in Bangywangi und hatten in diesem Hotel gewohnt!
chunks.text:
Wir waren 6 Wochen geschäftlich in Bangywangi und hatten in diesem Hotel gewohnt! Unser Fazit wir hätten nicht besser wählen

 können 
Der komplette Staff beginnend mit den Rezepionsangestellten, bis zu den fleißigen Männern die für die Sauberkeit zuständig sind  alle freundlich, höflich und sehr hilfsbereit, das haben wir noch nie in diesem Ausmaß erlebt. Auf diesem Weg nochmals ein großes Dankeschön! Die Küche ausgezeichnet auch da noch Mal ein großes Dankeschön für die Erfüllung meiner kleinen Wünsche beim Frühstück. Wir haben uns unglaublich wohl gefühlt und haben heute mit schwerem Herzen By,by gesagt! Vielleicht sehen wir uns einmal wieder, wenn Bangywangi dann nur Kokoon!!!

chunks.summary:
Neat, Clean & Pleasant Stay
This hotel is neat, clean, pleasant, and convenient to stay in.
chunks.text:
Neat, Clean & Pleasant Stay
This hotel is neat, clean, pleasant, and convenient to stay in. It was our second time here, and this time we had the chance to enjoy the bar next to the pool, which was very enjoyable. Unfortunately, we didn’t get to experience the pool itself as it was already late at night and we were a bit tired after a long drive. Breakfast is always a highlight, with plenty of variety, and the outdoor terrace setup facing the mountain views is simply wonderful.

chunks.summary: Always my place to stay when in Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Always my place to stay when in Banyuwangi. Kokoon never failed to impress me. The staff, the cleanliness,  the room, everything always up for the high standard. A little room for improvement perhaps is on the number of variety of breakfast. Would love to see traditional banyuwangi snack or breakfast, like kue kucur or nasi tempong as part of daily menu

chunks.summary: Menurut saya, the best hotel di Banyuwangi..
chunks.text: Menurut saya, the best hotel di Banyuwangi.. Sudah beberapa kali nginep disini (mungkin sudah 10x an). Dan sudah bandingin juga dengan hotel2 yang lainnya. Kokoon punya jg bagus & bersih, lokasi gampang, fasilitas OK (pool, fitness, spa), makanan cukup enak, dan yg terpenting bagi saya, parkiran basement jadi adem, mobil tidak kejemur... Saya ada beberapa foto-fotonya.. Follow IG: foodtory untuk review lainnya

chunks.summary: We visited this spa hoping for a relaxing experience, as we truly love everything about the hotel.
chunks.text: We visited this spa hoping for a relaxing experience, as we truly love everything about the hotel. Unfortunately, our interaction at the reception was not as warm as we had hoped. When we inquired about evening availability for four people, we were told it was fully booked and advised to check with the evening shift staff instead. It would have been more helpful if there had been some initiative to assist us with a booking. This left us feeling a little disappointed, and in the end, we chose to cancel our plans. We share this feedback in the hope that the spa can improve its customer service to provide a more welcoming and seamless experience for future guests.

chunks.summary: Hotel ga jelas.
chunks.text: Hotel ga jelas. Pas check in, di family room cuma dikasih 4 handuk mandi Dan 2 hand towels. Saya pikir memang seperti itu standard mereka. Eh, pas check out. Baru mau keluar parkiran, ditanya soal hand towels ada dimana? Saya pikir mereka bertanya tentang hand towels yang dua itu. Ternyata mereka tanya hand towels yang tidak pernah mereka kasih..Kata front office officer, harusnya mereka menata 4 handuk Dan 4 hand towels . Lah? Mana saya tahu? Pas check in cuma ada 2. Ya, 2 itu yang kami tinggalkan. Belum lagi saat sarapan, makanan pada kosong . Mereka lambat me refill. Untuk potato gratin,pas di refill, sisa dari wadah yang lama ditaruh asal di atas membuat tampilan yang menjijikan. Berulang kali saya sarapan di hotel, baru kali ini menemukan cara refill yang amburadul gini..

The cleanliness is top-notch, and the staff are incredibly friendly and helpful, enhancing the overall experience. However, there could be improvements in amenities, but the positives definitely outweigh this minor drawback.

chunks.summary: Menginap disini untuk urusan kantor.
chunks.text: Menginap disini untuk urusan kantor. Lokasinya strategis, di tengah kota. Hotelnya super bersih, begitu masuk disambut dengan taman sebelum masuk ke lobby, dan langsung denger suara gamelan khas jawa. Vibesnya langsung liburan dan rileks walaupun kerja… Staffnya ramah, urusan check in cepat. Bagus, karena memang udah capek banget seharian. Masuk kamar, kamarnya super bersih, fresh dan nyaman. Nuansa rotan-rotannya aku suka. Amenities pasti lengkap ya. Sandalnya batik. Kamar mandi terbuka, menyatu dengan tempat tidur, walaupun bisa ditutup, ya lebih suka dibuka aja. Pilihan sarapan bervariasi dan pas sarapannya juga gak ramai dan penuh, jadi bisa menikmati sarapan dengan tenang. So far, sangat enjoy stay di Kokoon hotel. Pengen balik kesini pagi bukan urusan kerja ya…

chunks.summary: Pengalaman menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi sangat luar biasa!
chunks.text: Pengalaman menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi sangat luar biasa! Semua aspek pelayanan benar-benar memuaskan. Staf hotel sangat ramah dan profesional, terutama Mbak Cynthia yang melayani kami dengan penuh keramahan sejak awal. Pelayanan yang diberikan benar-benar membuat kami merasa disambut dan dihargai sebagai tamu. Kamar hotel sangat bersih, nyaman, dan tertata rapi. Terima kasih khusus untuk Shobirin yang merapikan kamar kami dengan sangat baik! Fasilitas hotel juga sangat mendukung kenyamanan, dan yang paling kami suka adalah sarapannya! Menu breakfast-nya enak dan variatif, membuat pagi hari kami jadi lebih menyenangkan. Secara keseluruhan, Hotel Kokoon adalah pilihan terbaik untuk menginap di Banyuwangi. Kami sangat merekomendasikannya dan pasti akan kembali lagi jika ada kesempatan.

chunks.summary: This was a very comfortable place to overnight in Bayuwangi.
chunks.text: This was a very comfortable place to overnight in Bayuwangi. Although the food was slightly higher priced than expected, the rooms were great value for money. If anything you must stay here for the pillows. I regret I didn’t check the brand but they were the best pillows I have ever felt in my life. The best bit was there was one slightly firmer and the other one felt like a marshmallow.

chunks.text: Das Hotel ist perfekt, um eine Tour auf den Ijen zu machen. Die Unterkunft liegt in der Pick Up Zone für die Touren und das Hotel ist super, um am nächsten Tag zu entspannen. Es bietet Massagen an, hat ein super Frühstück und einen tollen Swimmingpool. Das Wlan funktioniert super schnell.

chunks.summary: This is an outstanding hotel!!!
chunks.text: This is an outstanding hotel!!! It is, in fact, 5 star level, and should be rated accordingly. The rooms are modern, generous and clean. The entire design of the hotel is elegant. The staff is extremely kind. My friend accidently left more than 1.500 EURs in the vault, and retrieved the full amount. When I had a health issue, they tirelessly looked to help me out. Everyone, literally everyone, is always very kind and welcoming. The spa is great, a large swimming pool and sauna. Breakfast is really good, one can choose from an endless number of different foods. I have been to 69 countries, and mostly stay at 4 or 5 star hotels, and I can honestly say that this is one of the best hotels I ever stayed in!

Pour first order at rooftop was great.
chunks.text:
The room was really great, clean, comfortable and with an amazing view 
Pour first order at rooftop was great. Second time they got our order wrong (Margherita instead of Pepperoni) and the cheese isn’t good so I wouldn’t recommend pizzas here
Our experience at Ijen restaurant on 3rd floor wasn’t great either. They sent the order with half of the protein missing, we then had to wait 10-15 minutes more

I wouldn’t recommend the spa. The massage wasn’t worth it. Either too hard or too soft, my leg hurts from the massage 2 days later. No music either.

chunks.summary: Hotel!
chunks.text:
Hotel! I had such a great experience staying at Kokoon Hotel  everything was just perfect. The room was clean, cozy, and beautifully designed. The location is strategic yet peaceful, making it easy to relax.🤍😍

What made it extra special was that I happened to be celebrating my birthday during the stay. I was so touched when the frontliner staff (I wish I remembered his name!) greeted me with a warm “Happy Birthday” and even surprised me with a little cake. It was such a thoughtful gesture and really made my day!🥰🥰🤍🤍

chunks.summary: Chambre grande, fonctionnelle et propre.
chunks.text:
Chambre grande, fonctionnelle et propre. Lit super confortable 
Personnel aux petits soins comme partout en Indonésie. La vue sur la mer depuis la chambre. Emplacement pratique pour un départ matinal au mont Ijen ainsi qu’au port pour rejoindre Bali. Petit déjeuner disponible si vous partez très tôt en excursion. Mal insonorisé (prévoyez les boules quies si vous avez le sommeil léger): on entend les voisins mais aussi le bruit de la route. Le petit déjeuner est moyen sauf si vous aimez manger asiatique dès le matin. Il y a tout de même la possibilité de manger des œufs (omelettes…) mais pas de yaourts par exemple

chunks.summary: We were welcomed with nice and cool lobby amidst the warm weather of Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: We were welcomed with nice and cool lobby amidst the warm weather of Banyuwangi. This is our second stay at Kokoon. Kokoon has proven that it can maintain its excellence from last year. Friendly staff, spacious and clean room, clean linen. Generous compliment (school holiday). Just one small piece of feedback: the room is not soundproof. We could still hear furniture being dragged around. Other than that, everything was excellent. Keep up the good work. Kudos for all staff and management.

chunks.summary: Luxurious and modernly designed yet felt natural.
chunks.text: Luxurious and modernly designed yet felt natural. The guest drop off, which is a bit separated from the hotel's main lobby, conveniently accomodates guests & personnel trafic and minimize the risk of being crowded and chaotic. The lobby is spacious yet its design is "warm" and inviting. Natural light penetrates easily. There is a hint of local (Javanese) culture in the interior. Guest room is cozy and uniquely designed. Basic free beverages are provided. Lighting and natural lighting are superb. Cleanliness is notable. Customer centricity and convenience are at optimum. Diversity of breakfast menu is quite good, from local/tradisional to western. Taste is perhaps something that can be improved. Overall, it was a nice experience.

Untuk kamarnya bersih dan bagus serta dapet pemandangan gunung. Aku coba fasilitas gym, kolam renang, dan sauna. Parkiran luas dan semua staf ramah. Overall recomended kalau mau bermalam di Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: Nice and clean hotel — definitely one of the top 3 hotels in Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Nice and clean hotel — definitely one of the top 3 hotels in Banyuwangi. Located on the main street in the southern part of the city. Friendly staff and a wide variety of breakfast options, including local dishes. There’s a nice café on the 16th floor with a rooftop deck offering great views. Facilities are good — not too close to busy areas, yet still convenient to reach the city center. A great place to stay if you’re looking to explore the southern part of Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: The hotel was very nice, value for money, and the service was top notch.
chunks.text: The hotel was very nice, value for money, and the service was top notch. The only downside is we requested non smoking room, but unfortunately since the hotel is full booked they turned the smoking room into non smoking for us. They tried to clean and give room spray but the smoke smells stays and got really uncomfortable. chunks.summary: Menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan dan tak terlupakan!
chunks.text: Menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan dan tak terlupakan! Hotel ini benar-benar memadukan kenyamanan modern dengan sentuhan budaya lokal yang kental, membuat setiap tamu merasa betah sejak pertama kali datang. 🛏️ Kamar Bersih & Nyaman Kamar-kamar di Kokoon sangat luas, bersih, dan dilengkapi dengan fasilitas modern seperti smart TV, AC dingin, kasur empuk, dan kamar mandi yang elegan. Beberapa kamar bahkan menawarkan pemandangan langsung ke Gunung Ijen atau area hijau yang menyegarkan mata. 🏊‍♀️ Fasilitas Lengkap & Instagramable Hotel ini punya kolam renang outdoor yang luas dengan pemandangan alam yang memanjakan. Area lobi dan taman juga sangat estetik, cocok banget buat kamu yang hobi foto-foto. Ada juga gym, spa, dan restoran yang nyaman untuk bersantai. 🍽️ Sarapan Lezat & Variatif Menu sarapannya luar biasa! Mulai dari makanan khas Indonesia seperti nasi goreng dan rawon, sampai pilihan western seperti roti panggang dan omelet. Semua dihidangkan dengan rasa yang nikmat dan pelayanan yang ramah. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Pelayanan Ramah & Profesional Staf hotel sangat membantu, ramah, dan responsif. Mereka memberikan pelayanan terbaik dengan senyum yang tulus, menjadikan suasana terasa hangat seperti di rumah sendiri. 📍 Lokasi Strategis Berada di jalur utama menuju Kawah Ijen, hotel ini cocok banget jadi basecamp sebelum pendakian. Dekat juga dengan pusat kota Banyuwangi dan tempat-tempat wisata seperti Taman Blambangan, Pantai Boom, dan Stasiun Banyuwangi Kota. ✨ Kesimpulan Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pilihan sempurna untuk liburan, bisnis, maupun transit. Suasana yang tenang, fasilitas lengkap, dan layanan kelas atas membuat hotel ini sangat layak direkomendasikan. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (5/5)

chunks.summary: Das Hotel hat nicht nur unseren Fahrer beeindruckt, der noch nie ein solche hohes Gebäude gesehen hatte.
chunks.text: Das Hotel hat nicht nur unseren Fahrer beeindruckt, der noch nie ein solche hohes Gebäude gesehen hatte. Wirklich ein tolles Hotel, sehr modern und luxuriös. Offenes Badezimmer im Zimmer mit verschiebbaren Holzwänden, tolle Aussicht in die Umgebung und Richtung Bali. Sehr schöner Poolbereich, sogar mit Sauna (getrennt nach Geschlecht), im Gebäude integriert und dennoch offen, ebenfalls tolle Aussicht auf die Berge. Internationales Frühstück mit sehr großer Auswahl und nette Bar auf dem Dach. Personal extrem freundlich und hilfsbereit. Unbedingt empfehlenswert: Wanderung auf den Vulkan Mount Jien, am Besten zum Sonnenaufgang und inkl. Bluefire Naturschauspiel!

chunks.text: "This hotel truly feels like a home away from home. From the moment you step in, the soothing scent of lemongrass sets the tone for a relaxing stay. The check-in and check-out process is seamless, and the hotel's cleanliness and comfortable beds ensure a restful experience. The staff, from front desk to cafe and housekeeping, are friendly and accommodating. Plus, the breakfast and lunch menu is delicious – a great touch to an already wonderful stay."

chunks.text:
Pengalaman pertama menginap di hotel ini, awalnya hanya book 1 malam saja, ternyata nyaman sekali dan memutuskan utk extend 1 malam lagi, semua karyawan mulai dr security yg sigap saat menyebrangkan mobil utk masuk ke area hotel krn jalanan di depan sangat ramai dan sulit kalau tidak dibantu bagi yg memakai kendaraan utk menyebrang. Sampai lobby jg langsung ada yg bantuin bawain semua barang, receptionist jg ramah. Untuk pak bagus yang 2 hari ini sudah membantu mempersiapkan ruangan kamar sangat bersih dan rapi, terimakasih banyak ya
Untuk sarapan banyak pilihan makanannya dan enak2. Oh iya parkirannya luas sangat penting bgt ini dan aman krn parkir basement. Area di dlm hotel
Keseluruhan sangat bersih
Terimakasih kokoon, kalau ke banyuwangi pasti akan menginap disini lagi

chunks.summary: Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi!
chunks.text: Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi! Lokasi hotel strategis dekat dengan pusat Kota Banyuwangi namun dekat dengan akses jalan menuju ke pantai pantai di selatan Banyuwangi. Kamarnya besar dan bagus, selain itu sarapannya juga enak banget. Fasilitas yang menurut saya wajib dicoba adalah sauna yang tersedia di lantai 2. Apresiasi khusus saya berikan kepada Mbak Cynthia di Front Office yang sangat ramah dan helpful, di mana Mbak Cynthia bisa merekomendasikan tempat-tempat makan yang enak di Banyuwangi. Bahkan ketika saya lupa dengan barang titipan saya di freezer, Mbak Cynthia mengingatkan kepada saya. Saya merekomendasikan turis yang ingin ke Banyuwangi untuk menginap di hotel ini

chunks.text:
Basically we got great experiences when we stayed at Kokoon Hotel for 4D 3N. Their atmosphere and service are very good including Cleanliness of their room. We can buy some Starbuck'a products too beside taste of their meals very nice. This Hotel really very recommended if I and/or my colleagues will be stay at Banyuwangi again. Thanks and regards, 
Indra and family

chunks.summary: Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi!
chunks.text: Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi! Lokasi hotel strategis dekat dengan pusat Kota Banyuwangi namun dekat dengan akses jalan menuju ke pantai pantai di selatan Banyuwangi. Kamarnya besar dan bagus, selain itu sarapannya juga enak banget. Fasilitas yang menurut saya wajib dicoba adalah sauna yang tersedia di lantai 2. Apresiasi khusus saya berikan kepada Mbak Cynthia di Front Office yang sangat ramah dan helpful, di mana Mbak Cynthia bisa merekomendasikan tempat-tempat makan yang enak di Banyuwangi. Bahkan ketika saya lupa dengan barang titipan saya di freezer, Mbak Cynthia mengingatkan kepada saya. Saya merekomendasikan turis yang ingin ke Banyuwangi untuk menginap di hotel ini

chunks.summary:
Fasilitas hotel sangat baik dan lengkap, pelayanan baik, staff ramah, dapat kamar dengan mountain view

Breakfast sangat variatif, ada fasilitas gym, area yoga, pool, locker dan sauna yg bisa diakses gratis jika menginap

Jika berkunjung di high season pastikan konfirmasi request ke WA officialnya, seperti terkait jenis bed, lokasi kamar, karena walau sudah memilik tipe bed saat booking di website ternyata tetap harus disampaikan di request khususnya supaya terdata, apalagi saat high season dan hotel penuh sehingga kesempatan untuk menyesuaikan jenis bed juga terbatas.

chunks.summary: Kami wisatawan lokal merasakan sambutan hangat sejak check in - check out, karena ada kalanya di hotel lain karyawan lebih ramah dan hangat terhadap segmen tertentu atau kepada wisman dibanding kepada wisatawan lokal.
chunks.text: Kami wisatawan lokal merasakan sambutan hangat sejak check in - check out, karena ada kalanya di hotel lain karyawan lebih ramah dan hangat terhadap segmen tertentu atau kepada wisman dibanding kepada wisatawan lokal. Fasilitas kamar lengkap memenuhi kebutuhan traveller dan appreciate manajemen hotel sangat mengerti  kenyamanan di area shower khususnya bagi orang Indonesia. Ada jet shower di toilet, rain shower juga flexible shower. Hotel juga menyediakan peralatan fitnes yang cukup lengkap meskipun ruang gym kurang luas. Menikmati suasana malam hari dari deck di lt 16 sangat indah dan syahdu. Satu hal yang perlu ditingkatkan adalah area restaurant di lt3. Kurang nuansa alam seperti tanaman hijau, air terjun/mancur, kolam ikan dan juga saat kami breakfast tidak ada musik. Overall, hotel Kokoon recommended place to stay untuk para traveller yang berkunjung ke Banyuwangi. Terima kasih

chunks.summary: My first time staying at kokoon hotel and i'm very statisfied.
chunks.text: My first time staying at kokoon hotel and i'm very statisfied. We arrived in Kokoon after a tracking tour and were exhausted (and need of a good clean functioning shower and sleep). We got a wonderfull room at Kokoon and very very help us to recovery. The room is very spacious and comfortable. Breakfast is fantastic, many menu choises, delicious. 100% recommended for breakfast. We enjoy staying at Kokoon. I would recommended this hotel for my next trip at Banyuwangi.🫶🫶

chunks.summary:
Saya menginap di hotel ini selama 12 malam
Service yang diberikan receptionist hotel sangat ramah, hanya lewat receptionist saja saya disapa dengan baik

Selain itu hotel memberikan complimentary service untuk saya seperti buah atau breakfast spesial, ini luar biasa

Kemudian ruangan saya selalu dibersihkan dengan baik, selalu rapih dan bersih

Selain itu saat saya tertinggal barang, pihak hotel membantu mengecek dan barang tersebut diinfokan masih ada dalam kondisi baik

Selain itu, sarapan di hotel ini punya menu yang beragam, dan saya suka Stall Indomienya !

chunks.summary: Stay in here for 2 nights, they provide king size bed as requested.
chunks.text: Stay in here for 2 nights, they provide king size bed as requested. The frontier was really helpful during stay. I love the minimalist interior and they provide excellent amenities. The concierge also very helpful when I have to cross the road to try local food. Tried the bbq all you can eat, the price quite affordable. But the meats they served no longer warm. The ambience during dinner buffet was good, there’s live music also shisha with affordable price too. The hotel located in the city, near to park also if you wanna go south it only took 1 hour. I would love to back here again.

chunks.summary: Awalnya tidak terlalu berharap banyak dari Hotel ini karena mungkin baru dengar nama Hotel Kokoon.
chunks.text: Awalnya tidak terlalu berharap banyak dari Hotel ini karena mungkin baru dengar nama Hotel Kokoon. Tapi pada saat mulai masuk di halaman depan Hotel mulai merasakan customer experience journey yg memuaskan dimulai dari ramahnya tim Security dan roomboy. Proses Cek In mudah, cepat dan ramah. Saat itu juga ditawarkan welcome drink & snack yg enak. Kami jg dikasi voucher free Cappucino, Latte atau Americano di stall Starbucks yg ada di area Lobby hotel, sungguh baru kali ini dpt free voucher sbux pd saat menginap di hotel. Kamar juga spacious, bersih dan sangat nyaman sekali dan dapat free snack sebagai bentuk dukungan manajemen hotel untuk UMKM, salut. Menu sarapan pagi enak dan variatif dengan berbagai menu local food. Kalau misal ke Banyuwangi lagi bakal bermalam di hotel Kokoon lagi. Sukses selalu untuk tim & manajemen Hotel Kokoon.

chunks.text:
Senang sekali bisa menginap dengan kokoon hotel banyuwangi🫶🏻🫶🏻
pemandangan dari kamar saya sangat indah! sangat ingin menginap kembali di kesempatan berikutnya. proses check in cepat dihandle dengan receptionist yang ramah, bellboy juga menawarkan bantuannya untuk membawakan barang kami. Fasilitas kolam renang, saya berenang di malam hari, cukup luas! saya puas bisa berenang di indoor swimming poolnya. makan malam kami lezat! saya makan malam dengan nasi bakar iga. staff restou juga sangat ramah ketika menanyakan pesanan menu makan malam kami. proses check out juga cepat ^_^ 
Terima kasih kokoon for all the good service keep up!!🫶🏻🫶🏻❤️‍🔥

chunks.summary: We had a great stay at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi!
chunks.text:
We had a great stay at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi! The hotel is clean, comfortable, and has excellent facilities. The staff are friendly and helpful. Great location, and excellent service. Highly recommended for families and couples! - Clean and comfortable rooms
- Friendly and helpful staff
- Great location
- Affordable price

chunks.summary: Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi is undoubtedly the best place to stay in Banyuwangi, offering breathtaking views of both the mountains and the sea.
chunks.text: Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi is undoubtedly the best place to stay in Banyuwangi, offering breathtaking views of both the mountains and the sea. The hotel's strategic location allows guests to wake up to the stunning sunrise over the ocean and enjoy the serene atmosphere of the surrounding mountains. The rooms are tastefully designed, providing a comfortable and relaxing stay. The staff are friendly and attentive, ensuring that all guests' needs are met. What sets Kokoon Hotel apart is its exceptional view. Imagine sipping your morning coffee while gazing out at the endless blue sea, or watching the sunset behind the majestic mountains. It's a truly unforgettable experience. Overall, Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi is a must-visit destination for anyone looking for a relaxing and scenic getaway. Its unique blend of natural beauty, comfort, and hospitality makes it the perfect choice for travelers seeking an unforgettable experience.

chunks.summary: They have a lovely view from balcony and restaurant.
chunks.text: They have a lovely view from balcony and restaurant. I got a catcalling from one of the staff when i was at the parking area. They think who they are? I hope the management of this hotel teaching him of respecting they own guests!!! Ps: they do catcalling to me during the day with 2 woman and 2 man here. Disgusting behaviour!!!

chunks.summary: hotelnya okee bangetttt dengan harga yang masih bersaing dengan hotel lain dibanyuwangi, bahkan lebih murah jika dilihat dari segi kualitas dan pelayanan.
chunks.text: hotelnya okee bangetttt dengan harga yang masih bersaing dengan hotel lain dibanyuwangi, bahkan lebih murah jika dilihat dari segi kualitas dan pelayanan. dan juga satpamnya ramah dan bisa dibilang sangat membantu, guest servicenya juga oke bangettt proses check in maupun check out sangat cepat, lalu ,kamar bersih, nyaman, wangi bikin betah pokonya. dan kemarin aku dapet dinner iftar juga enak dan sangat beragam pilihan menu mulai dari masakan indonesia sampai timur tengah, tahun ini kokoon hotel menyelenggarakan buffet iftar yang bertajuk (sajadah vol.2) yang berhadiahkan UMROHH, *bagi yang beruntung . makanan yang aku pesen ala carte pun juga enak banget nget nget. oiya dihotel ini juga ada gym, sauna, sama kolam renang. jadi kalau emang mau stay aja dihotel dan ga keluar kemana mana, ini cocok banget. hotel ini beneran rekomen deh buat kalian yang lagi mau liburan ke banyuwangi, karena akses ke kota deket bangett, kurang lebih 5 menit. Overall nilai untuk kenyamanan, kebersihan, serta pelayanan yang diberikan 10/10

chunks.summary: Gag santika, El royal, kokoon, astoon, ilira, luminor duhh sama ajeee!!
chunks.text: Gag santika, El royal, kokoon, astoon, ilira, luminor duhh sama ajeee!! KALIAN OVER PRICE!!! Bukannya apa nih . Harganya sudah terlalu over pricing!! Fasilitas gitu doang! Kamar ukurannya segitu, bednya juga ukuran pelit banget,!! Harga segitu dah mahal ga dapet breakfast!! Rugi dong!!!! Dah tau daerah 3T!! MANAJEMENNY th llll Saya ga bandingin tapi Jelas fakta mending nginep di hotel daerah Jember saja dah!! 200~300 an ribu, kamar ukuran 30 m2  sudah ada bathub, kolam renang, breakfast, amenitis lengkap, dan di tengah pusat kota pula!!... Duhhh ga tau lah akomodasi hospitality di Banyuwangi kayak ampas!!! Kalian manajemen hotel sudah tau wisata di seni sepi!! Kalo mau rame, hospitality ya turunin harga!! Turunin... Harga seginii astaga... Gak bakalan sih balik ke sini

chunks.summary: Everything in this hotel is good & almost perfect.
chunks.text: Everything in this hotel is good & almost perfect. Comfortable bed, Gym, sauna, swimming pool, rooftop bar & spa. But for me who bring 2 toddlers, this hotel just almost perfect. To make it perfect, we need bigger kids club there. Yes, the kids club is quite tiny. Even my kids don't want to go inside because the room is quite small. But overall is good. Staffs also friendly.

chunks.summary: I have been here 2 times with almost 4 years apart, and this hotel remains amazing.
chunks.text: I have been here 2 times with almost 4 years apart, and this hotel remains amazing. I love the room design, both bathroom and bedrooms are spotless. They provide complimentary local snack which was tasty! Moreover, best part of it was the indoor pool! The pool and gym is accessible since 6 am to 9 pm! Maybe the only degradation is on the breakfast menu, seems less variance compared to 4 years ago, other than that is amazing! They gave free welcome drinks as well on their rooftop bar

chunks.summary: 15 km dari pelabuhan ketapang, agak jauh dari kota banyuwangi.
chunks.text: 15 km dari pelabuhan ketapang, agak jauh dari kota banyuwangi. Hotel baik, kebersihan baik. Staff kurang membantu. Tiba disana jam 12 malam hotel gelap, sepu di depan, tidak ada petugas yang membantu angkat turun barang. Sampai lobby receptionist laki hotel ramah dan baik. Breakfast kurang variasi. Jam 11.30 minta perpanjangan 30 menit, check out 12.30 (harusnya jam 12), receptionist cewek bilang tidak bisa. Saya jelaskan (by phone) kita datang jam 12 malam, tetap tidak boleh! Harus segera keluar jam 12.00. Turun ke lobby utk check out jam 12.00, receptionist cewek (trainee, penerima telpon yang sama tadi) bilang boleh late check out, barang dan kita sdh buru2 keluar kamar, sampai lobby receptionist check out dibilang boleh late chrck out, ya percuma udah keluar. Gofood juga harus ambil diluar, jalan ke depan, bertanya beberapa kali tidak ada inisiatif staff nya untuk bantu ambil. Sampai 3x nanya baru ada receptionist lain berbisik, lalu bertanya apk mau dibantu ambil. Keluar hotel juga tidak ada yang membantu, angkat barang ke mobil di depan hotel juga tidak ada staff yg membantu. Pelayanan kurang!

chunks.summary: We have stayed at this hotel several times and book 2 rooms (king and twins).
chunks.text: We have stayed at this hotel several times and book 2 rooms (king and twins). But  usually we stay at this hotel when we go to Bali or on the way back home. But that holiday we stayed at this hotel 2 times, when we went to Bali and on the way back home (december and january). When we stayed at this hotel in 31 December 2024, they have event for new year, one room get one voucher for one person to attend the buffet and the event. If one room have two person, the one person can pay to attend the event, buffet, or both. Because i didn't attend the buffet dinner, i can't comment about that. But we order room service, we order nasi tempong and rawon fried rice, it was delicious (forgot to take a pict). I attend the event in the ballroom, the event was fun with great singers and exciting performance. For the room always clean, the breakfast has many choices.

chunks.summary: Pelayanan yg anagat memuaskan…berawal book family room utk libur lebaran bln April lalu via mas Malik krn sesuatu hal terpaksa harus direschedule, hingga bbrp kali…and finally di libur menjelang akhir tahun ini batu terealisasi… Pelayanan mas Malik sangat ramah dan responsif membantu keperluan kami saat reschedule…teirma kasih banyak 👍👍👍👍👍 Fasilitas hotel & kamar sangat nyaman, makanan di resto juga snack & buah di kamar okee banget, pelayanan sangat bagus & memuaskan kami sekeluarga berlima…Insya Allah next kembali ke Bwi masih ada bbrp destinasi yg belim dikunjungi meski sdh 4 hr 3 malam belum puas rasanyaa 😄😄.

chunks.summary: Sebelum menginap, saya sempat browsing ttg review tamu.
chunks.text: Sebelum menginap, saya sempat browsing ttg review tamu. Beberapa meninggalkan kesan positif pada layanan hotel. Penasaran seperti apa sih excellent service yang banyak di review orang"? Ternyata, servicenya bener" beyond our expectation.. dari mulai security, bellboy, FO, selalu menyapa&menawarkan bantuan. Lobbynya ga begitu besar, tapi bersih, wangi sereh. Proses check in/checkoutnya cepat. Kamar bersih, ac dingin, shower air panas stabil. Pak Shobirin terimakasih yaaa sdh buat kamar kami nyaman... Restonya byk variasi menu dan semuanya enak", ga nunggu kosong jg langsung di refill. Gercep padahal saat itu ada rombongan ... Ada indomie stall jg, dimsum, coffee machine, milo, kunyit asam, lengkap.. Yg bikin keren sih mba" egg station, sendirian tp bisa lho nginget siapa aja yg pesen ... Kl kondisi sepi sih biasa ya . Tp qt kmrn kondisi resto full. Tp tetep servicenya luar biasa... Mba Shellen&Pak Martin terimakasih banyak kmrn surprise nya untuk suami saya... Saya aja kaget 😂 terimakasih untuk service yang luar biasa dari Kokoon... Kami pasti balik lagi ..

chunks.summary: The rooms were spacious and clean.
chunks.text: The rooms were spacious and clean. The view from the room was nice. Despite informing the staff we would be checking out 16 hours early, we were charged an early check in fee, initially of 475,000 rupiah, then reduced to 375,000 only for them to attempt to charge 475,000 again. The cleaning staff rung the bell twice at 9am to try and clean the room. Granted we forgot to put the do not disturb sign on, but never have I been somewhere where they loudly rang the bell so early. 21% service charge on top of everything seemed excessive. The food was not very good. Especially the Western dishes, the local dishes were better. Granted this may be personal taste. Local restaurants were quite limited given the hotel is out of Banyuwangi centre. There was often a  communication issue which meant food such as fruit platter that was ordered, were not delivered. This is on top of menu options advertised not being available. I can see they’re trying to target the high end market, but a lot felt lacking. I personally wouldn’t recommend the hotel. Far too expensive compared to other options.

chunks.summary: Pengalaman menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi benar-benar luar biasa!
chunks.text: Pengalaman menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi benar-benar luar biasa! Hotel ini menawarkan suasana yang nyaman dan pelayanan yang ramah dari stafnya. Kamar yang bersih dan fasilitas modern membuat saya betah selama menginap. Sarapan yang disediakan sangat variatif dan lezat, ditambah dengan pemandangan yang indah dari area hotel. Lokasinya juga strategis, dekat dengan berbagai tempat wisata di Banyuwangi. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk siapa saja yang ingin menginap dengan kenyamanan maksimal!"

chunks.summary: The saying, „Never change the running system" is true if you've had good experiences with a hotel.
chunks.text: The saying, „Never change the running system" is true if you've had good experiences with a hotel. I should have known. Why did I choose the Kokoon Hotel this year?! Disaster. I had previously spent a week in Bangkok and of course only had positive things to say about it. I was very disappointed when I saw the breakfast buffet. Uninspiring. The cake was too dry. The bowls with the hot food were mostly empty and the staff were only trainees. The boss wants to cut costs on service. I also realized this when a trainee asked me whether I wanted my espresso served hot or cold. As always, the used plates sat on the table for ages. Nobody was interested. In Thailand the dishes weren't even cleared away after a minute. But this is not the highlight. I took my clothes to be washed. I would like to point out that I took them to the hotel laundry and not outside. I turned the clothes inside out because I always wash black clothes like this and the employee can READ the care instructions. The emphasis is on “READ”. If anyone is interested, of course. What happened? Two high-quality pairs of trousers and a high-quality polo came back from the laundry two sizes smaller. Of course, no one is aware of any wrongdoing. That’s obvious, it was my fault. Why do I take my laundry to a hotel laundry where the staff are incompetent?! Discussions about compensation were unsuccessful. It was my fault. Sorry, I don’t need that on vacation. And, there  were a total of five employees in the room, to whom I had to explain that clothes worth a total of €300 had now been "washed small". 🤦‍♂️ Then there was the problem with communication. Some employees do not understand English, or cannot speak English either. Added to this is the arrogance of not being aware of any guilt. After the fourth visit to me, they finally took the clothes away again. It was exhausting for me to check out because of stupid narrow-mindedness. But typical of Indonesia. Calling hotel prices like in Europe, and paying the staff a pittance, who then have no desire to provide a service that is worthy of a 4-star rating. Never ever this hotel.

chunks.summary: BAD HOTEL EVER!!
chunks.text: BAD HOTEL EVER!! I am a person who never does a bad review of a hotel. but this time it has gone too far. 1. When we arrived, the reception staff couldn't use English, making my colleague (foreign people) confused about making payments and the information was very unclear. 2. The laundry at this hotel destroyed all our new clothes. even though I have told the staff that the clothes and trousers are written on how to wash them. but they wash as they want so that all the threads of our clothes and trousers are damaged, all the sizes of our shirts and trousers are also shrinking and they are no longer comfortable. this may look strange but this happened in this hotel. when we ask for responsibility they just say double check. 3. The breakfast menu is very poor. all the workers at this hotel are mostly trainees, which means they are not  fluent in guest service yet. Dirty plates and glasses were also not removed so they piled up on the table. and again they can't use English. 4. When we request something it also takes a long time to handle it, it is not recommended for those of you who want to go on holiday looking for comfort 5. Now I just know why this hotel is very quiet and there are no guests staying. this is because service 0, Product 0 . 6. And you should know that from 6 days we checked out on the 3rd day because it was very uncomfortable here. This is the bad hotel ever. Please stay away otherwise you Will be dissapointed like us !
