chunks.summary: We arrived in Kokoon after a trekking tour and were exhausted (and in need of a good clean functioning shower).
chunks.text: We arrived in Kokoon after a trekking tour and were exhausted (and in need of a good clean functioning shower). We got a lovely room at Kokoon on a high floor and it was such a happy moment!. The rooms are modern and has proper flooring (not carpet which i personally dislike)  and great beds. The only thing to note is that the toilets do not lock. (sliding door, open concept style). FYI for those for whom this is a dealbreaker. Another thing to note is that the ala carte food here is EXPENSIVE. We had one dinner here and the food was not great. But the bill was a lot. Breakfast is FANTASTIC - we stayed at a 5 star hotel in Jogja later on in our trip and Kokoon's breakfast was leaps ahead in quality and variety., 100 % recommend for breakfast!! They have an amazing viewing deck on the top floor. Would stay here again for sure, we had a good time.

chunks.summary: You will not be disappointed in booking to stay here : the staff are amazing.

We are already planning our next trip to stay with them in Surabaya: and look forward to the experience there.

chunks.summary: new hotel in banyuwangi and exceeded my expectations...
chunks.text: new hotel in banyuwangi and exceeded my expectations... beautiful hotel and room design, friendly staff, beautiful mountain and sea views, super breakfast... all food is cooked seriously not just "there".... it's not strange that  food always runs out quickly... they have to refill quickly haha... the parking area is quite large even though it's always full... a transit hotel that is really comfortable... but the play facilities for children seem limited but it's not a problem for 1  -2 nights

chunks.text: Hotel yg bagus, baru masuk bagian depan sudah terasa asri, penataan taman, bale yg berikan kesan adem. View kamar bisa ke gunung atau jalan dan pantai (tapi agak jauh). View gunung akan bisa lihat rumah2 penduduk, dan aktifitas merwka dlm keseharian, masih ada yg mandi n mencuci di sungai. Hal minus : di 2 hari terakhir, toilet paper tidak ada, dibiarkan kosong padahal kamar sudah dibersihkan. Kunci kamar hanya dikasih satu, sementara beberapa hotel lain sudah otomatia berikan 2 kunci. Ada kulkas kecil di kamar, tapi tidak dingin. Naruh minuman disitu semalaman, tidak menjadi dingin. Kulkas jadi aeperti lemari kecil biasa. Menu breakfast termasuk enak, tapi variasi censerung monoton, dan sedikit. Jika anda nginap seminggu, di hari ke-3 , breakfast jadi terasa datar.

chunks.text: On my way home, I always stop at the Kokoon to recuperate after a busy time at work. After I check into my room, I always head to the rooftop to catch up with my friends who always make me feel special and welcome. Icy cold beers and a delicious meal, then into comfy bed. The Kokoon is a luxurious escape - the perfect chill out. The bar staff at the rooftop are 100% excellent - thanks for being there.

chunks.text: When we arrived at the hotel we were a little sad that we would only be staying until our very early morning departure for the sunrise on Mt Ijen, because the room was impeccably clean, beautifully designed and had a very nice atmosphere. All the staff were extremely helpful and friendly and there were many facilities available which unfortunately we didn't get the chance to use. There was even some live music in the outdoor dining area on the ground floor! I highly recommend this hotel!

chunks.summary: Update 03 Mar 23: Thanks to Kokoon for responding my feedback promptly.
chunks.text: Update 03 Mar 23: Thanks to Kokoon for responding my feedback promptly. The porridge bowl has been upgraded to the more convenient size. And during my morning gym activity, within an hour the staff frequently checks the towel and water. Nice work. Newest four-star hotel in Banyuwangi. It offers a warm ambience with a combination of wooden and rattan furnitures. Nice rice field and mountain view lays behind the hotel, within short walking distance to get into the field. They have nice and spacious outdoor and indoor seating areas. The Fitness Centre has three treadmills an a class area completed with yoga mat. There’s also small indoor swimming pool. Overall you’ll get what you can expect from a four-star hotel. And like other newly built hotels, you’ll find tons of power outlets in the room. What needs to improve (that’s why it lacks one star from me): Response. On my first day using the gym, the water dispenser was empty, while the gym was fully occupied. It takes nearly one hour to get the water refilled. Soup bowl. As you can see in the pic, the soup and porridge bowl is too small! You’ll have to be careful when pouring the soup or porridge,  otherwise it will spill onto your hand. One scoop of if and the bowl is already full, leaving no room for the condiments. Towel: Below average, relatively small, thin, and doesn’t absorb moist well. A bit more effort to get the wet out of your body.

chunks.summary: You win what you paid.
chunks.text: You win what you paid. You get what you need. This is a feeling when we stayed in this 4 star hotel for one day in a family room yesterday. This is a modern and new hotel in Banyuwangi I think and located in a main road. Staffs were super friendly and accommodated. Check in check out was fast. Room was big and spacious, modern, clean and tidy with super comfy of bed and linen. Bathroom was modern with good water pressure and very clean and good smelling towel. Breakfast was superb and tasted good  with many variety of indonesian cuisine and bakery. For the price given we gave 2 thumbs up and enjoyed our stay in this hotel.

chunks.summary: Superb-class hotel in Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Superb-class hotel in Banyuwangi. Spent one night with family in January 2023 and definitely would love to come back. Thanks to their warm-hearted reception staff that asked and gave us connecting room at 6th floor directly (forgot his name, my bad). Everything went perfect and beyond our expectation. Helpful security, smiley receptionists, well-trained staffs, best chefs, extraordinary garden crews, and top-notch interior design! They serve incredible breakfast selection, taste like no others! Mie Aceh was my favorite dish, salad and its condiments were great tho. Love their lemongrass scent on the elevator (and the cultural illustration image). It's spotlessly clean; from the basement to the rooftop bar. Kokoon Hotel deserves a place in our heart. Thank you for all efforts. Salam dari Bali.

chunks.text: Lors de notre circuit, nous n'avons séjourné qu'une seule nuit dans cet hôtel assez étonnant par sa taille (une vaste tour dominant tous les alentours) et son environnement (il ne semblait pas proche du centre ville - ce qui n'était pas grave car nous devions nous lever tôt pour aller au Kawah Ijen). Service très professionnel et au top, nourriture variée et excellente au dîner comme au petit déjeuner, grande chambre très bien équipée, un hôtel de très bon standing.

chunks.summary: We stayed for 2 nights at separate date during our trip to Bali.
chunks.text:
We stayed for 2 nights at separate date during our trip to Bali. During pandemic we always trabel to Bali by car and always book Kokoon when transitting in Banyuwangi. We love the property, its grand, homey, clean, comfortable and has great view (choose mountain view room). But this time we are dissaponted with these o  our way back from Bali :
1. Check in. We arrived at 3 pm, we book 6 rooms and only 2 rooms avail. They’re able to put at the same floor but it takes another hour until room are ready. 2. Charge for pillow. I ask for extra pillow in my room, i travel with 3 kids and just need 1 extra pillow. They charge 30.000 for this pillow. From 6 room i only ask for 1 pillow and they charge the money. During check out i mention to reception officer about this, as loyal visitor i feel dissapointed with this strict and rigid policy. 3. During afternoon swimming there are no officer present, they event doesn provide towel. Always give 4-5 review on my previous review but this time i dissapointed with their service.

chunks.summary: The hotel is amazing, located a little further south of the city (about 7 km) it escapes the hustle and bustle of Ketapang ferry crossing.
chunks.text: The hotel is amazing, located a little further south of the city (about 7 km) it escapes the hustle and bustle of Ketapang ferry crossing. It has a stunning front garden and a beautiful grand lobby. If you stay here, make sure you get a room with breakfast. The food is wonderful, and you have a decent large of choice of mostly asian and local cuisine. The bread station has lots of choices (try bread with Sarikaya spread) and to top it off, there is plenty of cakes and sweet options. Choice of indoor or terrace seats, I would personally recommend the terrace seating where you will be entertained by the grand view of the mountains.

chunks.summary: we stayed one night here before continuing our trip to Surabaya.
chunks.text: we stayed one night here before continuing our trip to Surabaya. we drove from Bali for 5 hours and then took the ferry to cross the Bali strait, so this hotel was our transit hotel. we booked the junior suite room, located on the 15th floor, just below the roof top restaurant. the room has spacious living room, however it only have 1 TV. the bathroom is spacious however the hotel management may perhaps consider putting blur stickers on the toilet and shower glass windows not only doors. since we were too tired, we decided to dine in for the dinner. fortunately they offered BBQ buffet on the roof top bar with very reasonable price. the meats and seafood were juicy and tasted good. Breakfast was served on the 3rd floor and has many options from western to local delicacies. The Junior Suite has a small balcony,  however for safety reason they locked it. Key to the balcony is available upon request and guests would be asked to sign a safety consent.

chunks.summary: We knew the hotel is fairly new, but a lot of new hotels are already run down by year 2.
chunks.text: We knew the hotel is fairly new, but a lot of new hotels are already run down by year 2. This one is an exception. It is exceptionally clean and still maintain its built quality. You can see that they do not use cheap materials to build the hotel. The rooms are large with amazing mountains and paddies view. The bathroom is uniquely designed with rolling doors. Check-in and check-out was smooth and fast. The staff are all very well-trained and friendly. Breakfast has a lot of variation and all tasted very nice. I dont have anything bad to say about them, except maybe for a very minor thing: their towels smelled weird... probably from their drier. But other than that, two thumbs up for Kokoon!! Will definitely stay here again when we're in Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: I always choose to stay at the Kokoon Hotel when I am in Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: I always choose to stay at the Kokoon Hotel when I am in Banyuwangi. From the moment you enter the airconditioned entrance foyer with the calming lemongrass scent, you experience complete serenity. After settling into my room, I usually head to the rooftop bar for a refreshing cool drink and catch up with the excellent staff, then later retreat for a relaxing massage to remove any residual travel stress. The food is excellent, the beers are cold, and the staff are fantastic.

chunks.summary: This is not my first visit to banyuwangi, and lately i prefer Kokoon Hotel for a place to stay.
chunks.text: This is not my first visit to banyuwangi, and lately i prefer Kokoon Hotel for a place to stay. The first reason is because of the amazing view from the 10th floor and the rooftop. The second reason, is that the breakfast menu is very diverse, and always presents a wide selection of traditional menus. Being here makes you feel homesick for childhood cooking. Third, friendly and fast service, as well as professionalism from the hotel staff. Fourth, large rooms and Fifth, close proximity to the airport.

chunks.summary: Nous avons séjourné au Kokoon Hôtel pendant 4 jours.
chunks.text: Nous avons séjourné au Kokoon Hôtel pendant 4 jours. Après avoir traversé Java d’Est en Ouest, nous avions besoin de nous poser avant de rejoindre Bali. Le Kokoon Hôtel était le lieu idéal pour cela. Des chambres magnifiques, très propres, très bien équipées avec une très belle vue. Des repas variés et délicieux. Une superbe piscine, un spa, une salle de sport et un agréable rooftop…bref un petit paradis de détente. Et surtout un personnel très attentionné avec toujours le sourire ! Merci à l’ensemble de l’équipe.

chunks.summary: Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi, dengan roof top di ketinggian 161 meter di atas permukaan laut.
chunks.text: Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi, dengan roof top di ketinggian 161 meter di atas permukaan laut. Di sini saya bisa menikmati suasana senja ketika matahari tenggelam, sambil menikmati sajian all-you-can-eat bersama keluarga dan para sahabat di area Rooftop Lounge di harga 75k. Kamar hotelnya tersedia dalam tipe deluxe room, family room dan junior suite dengan harga mulai 700k hingga 1900k, dan 1 kamar spesial dan satu-satunya di hotel ini, yaitu Kokoon Suite di harga 5000k. Sepertinya saya harus kembali menginap di sini untuk berburu matahari terbit juga.

chunks.summary: Salah satu hotel berkualitas di Banyuwangi Hari ini sempat ada pemadaman listrik beberapa menit.
chunks.text: Salah satu hotel berkualitas di Banyuwangi Hari ini sempat ada pemadaman listrik beberapa menit. Ukuran kamar standard TV menggunakan ukuran besar sekitar 40" Pelayanan ramah Untuk makanan pembelian ojol bisa dititipkan di resepsionis. Cafe di lantai 3 dan 16 TIPS : Untuk cafe lantai 3 rasa makanan kurang enak harga agak mahal sekitar 400rb untuk 3 porsi dan ayamnya agak alot. Coba sendiri deh. bumbunya hambar, AYAMnya ALOT...untuk yang transit di Banyuwangi mungkin Bisa dibarengi GoFood karena masih buka sampai jam 11, tidak seperti di Bali yang tutup sekitar jam 7/8 malam. Cafe lantai 16 tersedia PS3 dan set driving lengkap Untuk sabtu minggu ada BBQ sampai jam 10 malam saja. Gym dan lift bisa diakses menggunakan room card. Ada swimming pool, untuk ruangan kids corner sangat kecil.muat sekitar 1 keluarga saja Summary : Nice hotel, arsitektur modern. Fasilitas lengkap, tapi masih bisa ditingkatkan.

chunks.text: Kami stayed di Family Room & very impressed dengan luas kamar & 2 king beds. View juga sangat indah. Kami dinner di hotel & sangat puas dengan rasa, harga, & service. Breakfast juga cukup enjoyable tapi masih bisa di improve, terutama untuk kopi yang menggunakan dispenser Nescafe. Sayangnya lokasi cukup jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang & juga ke arah Probolinggo untuk road trip. Opsi makanan di luar hotel juga terbatas dibandingkan hotel sekelas di Banyuwangi. We enjoyed our stay & will return whenever we transit in Banyuwangi again.

chunks.summary: Place: dekat jalan raya, mudah dicapai.
chunks.text: Place: dekat jalan raya, mudah dicapai. Hotelnya nyaman, model industrial minimalis mixed with a little bit of ecletic 👍👍👍👍  Ambience: Kami mendapatkan kamar dengan view sawah, gunung Ijen dan rumah penduduk. Nyaman dan segar banget pagi2 melihat kehidupan sekitar 😍😍😍 F&B: Masih perlu ditingkatkan lagi. Untuk menu in room dining, sambal nasi tempongnya kurang sedap, sayur lalapnya masih keras (bayamnya). Makanan untuk breakfast all you can eat, beberapa menu masih belum stabil rasanya, kadang terlalu asin, kadang kurang bumbu. Yang enak: sup pho vietnam, soto ayam, cookiesnya. Facility: Bagus 👍👍👍👍👍 Lengkap ada pool, sauna, gym, deck 360° tempat melihat pemandangan kota Kebersihan: Sedikit perlu lebih ditingkatkan lagi 👍👍👍👍👍 Staff: ramah, sopan dan menyenangkan. Memperhatikan protokol kesehatan, tidak boleh melepas masker di area breakfast, kecuali saat makan. Customer diberikan sarung tangan untuk mengambil makanan. Keep up the good work yaaa 👍👍👍👍👍👍

Begitu Masuk ke Hotel kita akan disambit dg Ramah oleh staff Hotel,  dan diantar ke Kamar yg sangat bersih dan rapi..semua kamar sangat Steril..bersih dan keren..😍😍 karena View Hotelnya begitu kita buka jendela adalah Gunung-gunung yang cantik..klau menginap di hotel ini, kita tidak perlu bawa Sandal buat santai..sandalnya lucu dan nyaman dipakai..untuk keperluan mandinya..juga tidak perlu bawa-bawa shampho, sabun dan sikat gigi dan sabu..semuanya lengkap..I love it..❤❤ Paginya kita disiapkan Break Fast di lantai 3.. Semua Menunya Enak..hanya sayangnya..Pas di Roti Bakar..saya tidak menemukan Selai Strowberry..krn itu Selai Fav..saya..😅😅 klau begini..next time bawa selai sendiri dech..😁😁 selesai sarapan..mumpung masih pagi Naik ke lt 16 untuk melihat Banyuwangi dari lt 16..seruuuu banget..Terimakasih sudah membuat merinding..di lt 16, tapi saya harus ambil photo-photo dulu..biar ada bukti sudah menikmati Hotel terbaik yang ada di Banyuwangi..😅😅🙏🙏.

chunks.summary: We stayed here 2 times, and the services are good!
chunks.text: We stayed here 2 times, and the services are good! We order two rooms and get a connected room, wifi also fast and stable. When our trip need a PCR test, the hotel also can arrange for a room test, so we dont need to go out. Convience parking in the basement for car. They also have a bar on the rooftop that open till late midnight and have a view to the city. The hotel has a restaurant which let you order local banyuwangi food, i.e Nasi Tempong. If you get bore, in front of the hotel there is big Indonesia restaurant, i.e. BALISAJI.

chunks.summary: Hotelnya keren, semua masih kelihatan bagus karena tergolong hotel baru.
chunks.text: Hotelnya keren, semua masih kelihatan bagus karena tergolong hotel baru. Kamarnya lumayan gede. Kebetulan saya stay di deluxe room. Paling gede diantara pesaing sejenis di Banyuwangi. Makanan enak, breakfast oke. View mantab. Cuma ad kelemahan sdikit waktu sy datang. Hotel segede itu tidak ada Doorman atau penyambut tamu di depan. Baru masuk para wanita front office kurang welcome, tidak ad greeting semenjak mereka melihat kita datang. Gesture, dan mimik wajah yang kurang friendly. Semoga bisa ditingkatkan lagi front liner nya. Eman property, fasilitas bagus kalau ada keek disitu. Karena itu kesan pertama tamu. Kebetulan kami baru nginep di seberang jalanya. Jadi bisa bikin perbandingan. Sukses kokoon Hotel BWI

chunks.summary: Haloo Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Haloo Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Saya begitu tertarik membaca ulasan tentang hotel Anda yang katanya service memuaskan, TAPI sayang sekali ketika saya menelpon untuk bertanya "apakah ada mobil dari hotel yang bisa menjemput tamu ke stasiun ?" (karena saya berencana datang naik kereta) jawabannya muter2 tidak jelas 🙃 . Dari saya ditanya tanggal, sudah kasi, masih disuruh menghubungi nomer WA lain. Resepsionis Anda / siapapun yang menjawab di telpon tinggal mengatakan : ada / tidak. Se simple itu 🙂 . Jika memang ADA dan saya diminta menghubungi nomer WA lainnya entah siapa, saya bersedia. Karena sudah jelas jawabannya. Anda harus memperbaiki lagi pelayanannya. Supaya tidak percuma review baik yang diberikan customer kepada hotel Anda.

chunks.text: Buat orang yg suka gemerlap lampu malam hari, bermalam disini sangat pas karena view malam hari kota Banyuwangi bisa dilihat dr rooftop lantai 16, nice banget. View dari dalam kamar bisa pilih view gunung ijen, sawah dan rumah penduduk (bisa juga lihat kereta api lewat dari sisi ini) atau bisa juga request view selat Bali (bisa lihat sunrise). Makanan enak, kl lagi puasa bisa request breakfast nya diantar saat waktu sahur, asal konfirmasi dulu ya. Kl sedang tdk puasa, makanan utk breakfast bervariasi dan di refill setiap saat, resto bisa indoor dan out door dg view gunung ijen dan sawah. Gym, kolam renang dan sauna free masuk ke fasilitas kamar yg bisa digunakan mulai jam 6 pagi sampai 9 malam. Kolam renang nya semi indoor jd meski hujan tetep bisa renang donk. Kamar dan semua fasilitas bersih, modern, mewah dan bikin nyaman. Kl ke banyuwangi wajib coba bermalam disini

chunks.text: 非常令人愉悦的环境，可见远处伊真火山的雄伟壮观的景色，酒店的服务相当专业，餐饮可与五星级媲美。

chunks.summary: Saya booking via telpon.
chunks.text: Saya booking via telpon. Respon nya cepat dan pelayanan nya ramah. Hotel nya best laaah. Resepsionis pakai pakaian daerah banyuwangi. Dari mau masuk lobby udah keren. Suasana kamar ini kayak bintang 5. Kamar saya menghadap pulau bali. Ada rooftop nya, saya ga berani foto foto karena tegang,tinggi sekali. Padahal bisa jadi spot bagus untuk berburu sunrise. Saya ga sempat breakfast, karena subuh langsung ke bali, nyebrang dengan kapal. Nah lokasi hotel dengan pelabuhan itu 30 menit, dekat. Jadi aman, tidak rusuh atau khawatir telat. Next kalau saya ke banyuwangi, untuk ke ijen atau ke bali, saya pasti ke hotel ini lagi. Dan menikmati sunrise dari rooftop .

chunks.summary: One of the best hotel at Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: One of the best hotel at Banyuwangi. Bagi yang suka suasana hotel yang unik tapi tetap modern, hotel ini bisa menjadi salah satu pilihan. Desain interior dan exterior nya adalah salah satu yang terbaik. Saya cukup terkesan dengan hotel ini. Kamarnya sangat bersih nyaman. Desain kamar mandinya saya sangat suka. Dinding pemisah nya bisa di buka dan di geser2 sehingga menciptakan kesan lapang di dalam kamar. Fasilitas yang disediakan juga cukup lengkap. Cocok bagi yang mau staycation. Menu breakfast banyak pilihan dan enak2. Lokasi hotel juga sangat mudah dijangkau karena ada di jalan poros Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: Actually its a great hotel,  but i dont like the bathroom setup if you stay there with colleagues or friend.
chunks.text: Actually its a great hotel,  but i dont like the bathroom setup if you stay there with colleagues or friend. The wooden partition feels too 'thin'. 😊. Should be no problem if you stay alone. The gym can be improved,  the pool is great and also sauna. 👍 The breakfast is good too. The best location if you need to catch an early flight from banyuwangi Airport. It tooks only 15-20 minutes from hotel to airport,  you can use hotel tranport for the best experience.

chunks.text: Staycation di sini pekan lalu. Dapat room di lt 10 dg view gunung (plus sawah dan permukiman). Proses check in cepat dan tanpa deposit. Kamarnya nyaman bersih, interior designnya juga bagus. Amenities cukup lengkap, tp ga sampai ada setrika, sajadah dan alat jahit ya hehe. Menu breakfast variatif dan enak! Kalo malem tinggal nyebrang ke balesaji wkwk. Pagi sore nongkrong di rooftop mumpung sepi krn weekday. Pool nya aja yg agak pengap. Thankyou kokoon!

chunks.summary: Di luar expetasi, ga berap lebih dengan hotel kokoon ini setelah liat rivew-rivew nya ternyata sesampainya luar biasa Saran saya ambil yg ada balcon bagus banget view nya & request view pulau Bali/jalan raya Ga sempet foto foto saking nyaman nya enak di mata jadi lupa 🤣 hotel terbaik se Jawa timur versi saya!
chunks.text: Di luar expetasi, ga berap lebih dengan hotel kokoon ini setelah liat rivew-rivew nya ternyata sesampainya luar biasa Saran saya ambil yg ada balcon bagus banget view nya & request view pulau Bali/jalan raya Ga sempet foto foto saking nyaman nya enak di mata jadi lupa 🤣 hotel terbaik se Jawa timur versi saya! Saya tidak menemukan kekurangan yg berarti di hotel ini Minus nya hanya saya menjumpai kecoa di balkon🤣 tapi untung ga di dalam kamar! Lokasi nya jauh dari pusat kota klo mau order online sulit sekali dapat Drive nya Di sekitar hotel tidak ada kulineran sepi di depan juga , kamar nya kurang kedap suara karena suara kendaraan jalan raya terdengar,, Good job breakfast nya! -irisan buah nya aja terasa ga segar dan ga manis di tambah lagi cara motong motong tidak rapi Soal rasa makanan yg lain sangat baik! Tanpa deposit Lift mengunakan akses Bahkan fasilitas toilet di pool pun pakai akses card dan fasilitas gym pun mengunakan akses card , tapi boleh kok minta 2 kunci kartu biar ga ribet klo kita cek in ber 2 atau dengan keluarga

chunks.summary: Tempatnya bagus, kamarnya pun nyaman sekali.
chunks.text: Tempatnya bagus, kamarnya pun nyaman sekali. Pelayanan resepsionis pas aku check in agak kurang sih ( mungkin karena aku check in kepagian ). Cuma pas check out pelayanannya udah oke. Breakfastnya beraneka ragam seperti hotel bintang pada umumnya. Pelayanan di restaurantnya kukasih nilai sempurna, pada ramah2 bangetttt. Jadi enak suasana breakfast kalo gitu 😁 Untuk kolam renang disini indoor, berasa private pool kalo lagi sepi gda  orang, nyaman bgt ditambah ada ruang locker terpisah laki perempuan. Di rooftopnya ada bar n lounge. Karena ini hotel tertinggi dibanyuwangi, kita bisa lihat kota banyuwangi dari rooftop ini. Tempatnya nyaman.

chunks.text: 5 Oct 22 Hotelnya cakep mewah, fasilitas dan pelayanan ok. Di lantai 2 ada kolam renang dan toilet umum utk bilas, mandi ataupun sauna (ada di masing2 toilet cew/cow). Sebaiknya nyalakan dl sebelum renang, krn tipe sauna portable yg dinyalakan sebelum sauna (ada timernya). Kamarnya antik utk desain toiletnya, cakep 😁 saya suka, lain drpd yg lain. Di lantai atas rooftopnya ada resto dan area bermain game mobil gratis dan beberapa game lainnya. Suasannya kalau malam sexy2 gmn gt 😅 sempet liat menunya, utk 5 pcs sushi 75k. Di hotel ini dapat BF, dan menunya cukup lengkap dan rasanya ok. Pelayanannya mantap (yg melayani Merry). Ada salad bar, dan slice keju dan beef. 3 macam Sereal dan milk. Kue2 kecil, puding. Nasi, mie, ayam, ikan, soto, bubur dll.

chunks.text: Kokoon hotel..salah satu bintang di bwi yg masih mencari pasar customer.. Tentu masyarakat menengah atas yg akan menjadi customernya.. Sebagai hotel bintang harus selalu evaluasi dan koreksi terkait servis dan fasilitas yg disajikan.. Hari ini saya berknjung di top roof untuk mencoba makan... Sayang makanan kurang pas/ cocok , dan pelayanan terkesan lambat... Semoga KOKOON bisa exis dan maju di bwi...

chunks.text: Keren dan elegan! Lokasi strategis dengan pelayanan yang baik. Ada roof top, fitness center dan pool dengan tempat yang bersih dan menarik. Desain hotel dan kamar yang bagus, dengan kesan berwarna gelap tapi tidak terlihat atau terasa Spooky.

chunks.summary: Sangat sangat memuaskan.
chunks.text: Sangat sangat memuaskan. Kamarnya luas. Tersedia hair dryer juga. Pemandangan dari kamar bagus. Bisa pilih pemandangan sawah dan gunung atau pemandangan jalan raya dan laut. Pegawainya ramah, setiap ketemu selalu menyapa. Makananya enak. Waktu sarapan tersedia roti, jajanan pasar, salad, sereal dan nasi. Jadi yg sarapannya gk sama nasi tenang saja disana banyak pilihan menu sarapan. Tersedia ruang meeting yang nyaman dan luas. Ada beberapa ruang meeting, bisa pilih sesuai keinginan.

chunks.text: Ik had 2 kamers voor mij en mijn gezin. Zeer ruime en zeer schone kamers. Prima bedden. Wifi was goed. Er was koffiezet-apparatuur. Personeel vriendelijk en behulpzaam voor zover nodig. Uitgebreid buffet-ontbijt. Het hotel ligt op plm 20 minuten rijden van de haven Ketapang. Het hotel is nieuw. Aangenaam verblijf gehad. Ik kan wel heel veel opschrijven hier, maar het is gewoon een uitstekend hotel, dat geen verdere uitleg behoeft. Er waren geen negatieve zaken.

chunks.summary: I love how the facilities and the hospitality that kokoon provides, and the quality of services is something that I never experienced before.
chunks.text: I love how the facilities and the hospitality that kokoon provides, and the quality of services is something that I never experienced before. I look forward to having kokoon be my best choice to stay and reside. BRAVO KOKOON!

chunks.summary: I was stayed at this hotel for bussines reason.
chunks.text: I was stayed at this hotel for bussines reason. Hotel is clean, modern, with all kind of star hotel facilities. Most interesting one is you can find old local javanese food for breakfast, and enjoy your breakfast and coffee with beautiful mountain view. Recommended hotel ! and I will always stay at this hotel for my  visit at Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: This is an amazing resort, with all the facilities you need.
chunks.text: This is an amazing resort, with all the facilities you need. Also a great view on the vulcanoes, and you can even look over to Bali from the top floors. Different restaurants with good food and coffee (the breakfast is really an experience, a lot of good local delicacies). Spa and massage is also very relaxing. Nothing actually .. only that the pool is fully covered and not heated, and there are no towels provided.

chunks.summary: I'd rather choose this hotel instead of another even they come with lower price or higher grade.
chunks.text: I'd rather choose this hotel instead of another even they come with lower price or higher grade

chunks.summary: I am a regular at Hotel Kokoon and enjoy staying at the hotel, the facilities are always to a high standard and the staff are friendly, and provide great service.
chunks.text: I am a regular at Hotel Kokoon and enjoy staying at the hotel, the facilities are always to a high standard and the staff are friendly, and provide great service. I would recommend you improve the check in and check out procedures - they take far too long to do, sometimes ~10mins each? Try and speed this up, especially for regulars who you would already have details on file for. Kieran

chunks.summary: Bagus, nyaman, air panas mengalir dg sangat baik, interior bagus, internet (wifi) kencang & pemandangan dari kamar juga bagus.
chunks.text: Bagus, nyaman, air panas mengalir dg sangat baik, interior bagus, internet (wifi) kencang & pemandangan dari kamar juga bagus. Sedikit masukan untuk area depan lift di kamar tamu sangat panas krn tdk ada AC-nya dan pilihan menu breakfast terlalu sederhana walaupun rasanya enak juga.

chunks.summary: We had an overall wonderful stay at Kakoon.
chunks.text: We had an overall wonderful stay at Kakoon. The staff was friendly, the breakfast was delicious and the room was immaculate. Some points of improvement are that the the containers for the body wash and shampoo were already empty so we needed to buy our own. Also, the rooftop bar lounge area had mosquitos so we couldn't really enjoy that area without getting bitten by the little critters. However, all in all the accommodation was lovely.

chunks.summary: Kokoon Banyuwangi merupakan hotel dgn kualitas baik...
chunks.text: Kokoon Banyuwangi merupakan hotel dgn kualitas baik... dan lokasi tidak jauh dari kota

chunks.summary: Hôtel incroyable, service exceptionnel.
chunks.text: Hôtel incroyable, service exceptionnel. En particulier grâce à personnel adorable et très arrangeant et toujours souriant qui nous a couvert de petites attentions tout le long du séjour (viennoiseries offertes pour notre départ au Kawah Ijen, glaces pour nous faire découvrir les spécialités de la maison, late checkout accepté). Le manager était prêt à nous mettre à disposition une chambre gratuitement pour que l'on puisse se reposer quelques heures avant notre départ à minuit au Kawah Ijen, nous avons refusé car c'était beaucoup trop gentil... Les gens à Java sont en général très sympas et serviables mais là c'était au dessus de tout ce qu'on peut espérer. Le petit-déjeuner est très bon, gigantesque et varié. Massage incroyable et piscine très agréable. Les lits sont super confortables, la chambre est spacieuse et très propre. La vue est magnifique que ce soit des chambres ou du rooftop. Les plats du restaurant sont très bons. Tout était parfait, je ne peux que vous recommander l'expérience ! Rien, tout était fabuleux.

chunks.summary: I order 2 rooms for 3 adults, 1 - 8 years old ans twin 2 years old.
chunks.text: I order 2 rooms for 3 adults, 1 - 8 years old ans twin 2 years old. The receptionist gave me interconnecting room. The rooms were spacious. My children have fun there. I requested for 3 years old bed which they gave for free. It was a sofa bed actually so it has one open side. I put it exactly next to the main bed and put a chair behind it. It fits well for a toddler. All the staffs are friendly. The cleanlisness is superior. Food was great, the croissants were perfect in texture, you should definitly try it! Try the danish at their bakery too, too bad it is not available in breakfast buffet. Coffee was nice for the first 2 days  but on the last day it came out extremely sweet, not sure why. Overall I am truly satisfied with my stay

chunks.summary: Nice hotel as still new.
chunks.text: Nice hotel as still new. The rate we paid was definitely worth it. Breakfast and dinner was good, nice choices. Recommendation to the management: Website should feature either separate categories for twin and king size bed or give an option of the preferred bed choice when making a booking. Also, FO should be aware of the additional benefits when booking directly through the hotel's website and re-confirm these upon arrival. Nobody was aware of anything. But small hick-up. Guest Service Manager we met upon check out was very kind. Thank you, keep up the good work.

chunks.summary: Hotelnya baru, kamar bersih (1212), sprei & handuk bersih & wangi, lobby design modern, rooftop view cantik bisa lihat pantai & gunung, view kamar ke pantai juga istimewa, staffnya ramah, cantik-cantik & respond cepat, parkiran luas dengan lift yang aman, bisa tersambung ke kamar, plus ada charger untuk mobil listrik 32a.
chunks.text: Hotelnya baru, kamar bersih (1212), sprei & handuk bersih & wangi, lobby design modern, rooftop view cantik bisa lihat pantai & gunung, view kamar ke pantai juga istimewa, staffnya ramah, cantik-cantik & respond cepat, parkiran luas dengan lift yang aman, bisa tersambung ke kamar, plus ada charger untuk mobil listrik 32a. Ac, air hangat, internet & tv cable lancar. Paling penting adalah harga cukup terjangkau. Sarapan, pilihan menunya biasa saja (sempat under estimate) tetapi dari segi rasa itu pas & cocok di semua lidah, bisa sedikit diimprove lagi. Croissantnya istimewa gak kaleng-kaleng, mantap. Es jeruknya berbeda, boleh dicoba saat sarapan. Minusnya, adalah: sedikit agak jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang, kolam renangnya agak kecil, hanya cocok buat anak kecil & ikan mas saja. Kamar agak kurang kedap suara, sering terdengar bunyi ketika kursi di geser/orang berjalan di lorong. Kok ga ada welcome drink ke tamu, come on? Overall, cocok untuk kembali menginap di sini.

chunks.summary: We occupied the Family on 12th floor.
chunks.text: We occupied the Family on 12th floor. The room was spacious with 2 true King sized bed and offered a wonderful panoramic view of a flowing river, lush greenery as far as eye can see and mountains as backdrops. Super clean room with ample of in-room amenities. Breakfast was adequate and their fried "Onde-Onde" was superb. We tried the dinner bbq package at hotel rooftop...What we thought initially as a good value for money Dinner set, the dinning experience was a letdown. Dinner service was extremely slow, food selections for bbq that were served were limited & the seafood served were not fresh. We ordered bbq steak at additional cost...steak prices were  excluded from the set dinner prices...which is understandable. Hence, we recommend having dinner in the town rather than at hotel. Overall, we had a wonderful experience at Kokoon...friendly hotel staff, super clean room & facilities and good value for money.

chunks.summary: My family & I occupied the Family Room.
chunks.text: My family & I occupied the Family Room. We traveled with 2 teenagers and the room was spacious with 2 true king size bed. We were on the 12th floor and the panoramic view from the room of a flowing river, lush vegetations & mountains as a back drop was very mesmerizing. Rooms was spotless & in-room ammenities were excellent. We tried their rooftop bbq (all you can eat), and would prefer having dinner out of hotel. The restaurant staff was super friendly however service was very slow and the seafood bbq was not entirely fresh...selections of food were limited and we ordered steak bbq which required additional cost. Breakfast was adequate and fairly basic...although their "Onde-Onde" was super yummy. In house gym was adequate for the hotel size, swimming pool was not exposed to sunlight hence temp of pool water was slightly cold. Overall, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Kokoon and had a wonderful experience there. Thanks to their team of hotel staff.

chunks.summary: We were surprised to stay in this hotel, room was great, nice bed, nice breakfast, friendly staff and nice ambience overall incl indoor pool.
chunks.text: We were surprised to stay in this hotel, room was great, nice bed, nice breakfast, friendly staff and nice ambience overall incl indoor pool. Really enjoy to stay in this hotel. The bbq on saturday night was also good and enough, reasonable for the price. Will definetely come back again!

chunks.summary: Clean rooms.
chunks.text: Clean rooms. good location if you're taking the ferry. amazing views of the Bali Strait on the upper floors. Food was extremely expensive for low quality taste. It was just bland, not terrible but not worth the cost. Staff will charge you for extra pillows and blankets (we have two very small kids that need to stay in the same room). I asked them to produce their hotel regulations, the terms that authorized what would be charged additional fees but they could not produce any type of T&C documentation. I understand that what is due must be paid, or if they asked us to pay for another bed, that would have been fine, but they did not. They said kids were fine but that pillows and blankets needed to be charged extra. In the end, because they could not produce the hotel regulations, they said we did not have to pay for them. There is a "kids club" that is a tiny room without any toys :( kids were sad. Which is weird because they advertise for it and the staff asks, "did you check out the kids club?" "yes... and it's empty."

chunks.summary: The foods was good and the staff was so helpful, from the security, Reception, bellboy,waiter all was doing excellent job.

chunks.summary: Absolutely loved it.
chunks.text: Absolutely loved it. Brand new hotel with great amenities and facilities. We stayed in the family room with 2 large beds. Very spacious, well lit and had everything we needed. Room and bathroom was clean and aircon was functioning well. We used the pool area.. well maintained pool. Gym has a few treadmills and weights. It also has a couple of cycling/climbing equipment and a large area for yoga/pilates. It was well maintained. We also went up to the 16th floor to get the view from the rooftop bar. It’s spectacular.. if you decide to stay here, you should definitely do that too. This facility also has a massive parking space, we parked our car here. Check-in process was very smooth and staff were really friendly and helpful. I would definitely recommend this place and would love to stay here again. High speed internet (for ID standards) - best one ever for us. A bit more variety on breakfast would have been awesome but the current spread is good enough for a hearty breakfast.

chunks.summary: Excellent for All...
chunks.text: Excellent for All... Karena Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi memberikan pelayanan yang sangat hangat dan ramah dengan sentuhan pribadi. Dilengkapi dengan berbagai fasilitas yang modern, di mana perpaduan antara klasik-modern dengan unsur-unsur tradisional menyatu, menciptakan nuansa yang harmonis, sehingga saat menginap disana, saya dapat menemukan semua kenyamanan dan kebutuhan dalam perjalanan bisnis maupun liburan bersama keluarga. Lokasinya juga strategis, karena terletak di Jalan Raya Jember yang hanya berjarak sekitar 15 menit dari Bandar Udara Internasional Banyuwangi, dan 5 menit dari pusat kota. Terimakasih Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: Interior hotel bagus secara keseluruhan dan pemandangan pada dek paling atas luar biasa bisa lihat 360 derajat dari gunung sampai pantai, kondisi kamar nya bersih.
chunks.text: Interior hotel bagus secara keseluruhan dan pemandangan pada dek paling atas luar biasa bisa lihat 360 derajat dari gunung sampai pantai, kondisi kamar nya bersih.

1. We are very happy with concierge staff and bell boy staff who always replied our request with "dengan senang hati"
2. On our first day, we requested extra towel for my youngest daughter age 7 years old from the housekeeping and extra towel was delivered immediately. 3. We actually hung all of our towels on the bathroom rack and bathroom door handle - not requesting any change of towels - but apparently the cleaning service did change all of our towels and then we were given 4 new towels. We stayed in family room with two king beds, and I already informed the hotel that we are family of 2 adults and 3 of my children (age 14, 9 and 7 years old). So on the second day when we requested for extra towel from housekeeping, it was front office staff who answered and it was informed that there was extra charge for extra towels. Well this was quite suprising as on the first day we were given the towel without any information that there would be extra charge, and as far as I know, when we stay in hotels all around the world, there was no single charge for extra towel. Maybe this policy should be improved and there should not be extra charge for extra towel - as it is one of the basic amenities in 4 star hotels especially like Kokoon. 4. Overall experience was good - we would stay in Kokoon hotel when we visit Banyuwangi again.

chunks.summary: This is my second stay at this hotel in last 6 months.
chunks.text:
This is my second stay at this hotel in last 6 months. Kokoon is one of my favorite hotel in Banyuwangi. Eveything was nice :
1. Good ambience, very well maintained propoerty. 2. Room is clean, tidy, spacious and bery comfortable. Bed is also clean and comfy. 3. Separated showe chambers and closet, good amenity, good choices of soap and shampoo. 4. Friendly and helpful staff, check i  process was fast EXCEPT FOR MY LAST STAY. Now the bad part of my review. I stayed on 2 occassiob this time, during my departure to Bali i stay one night and everything was flawless. While during my way back home i book 1 suite room for 6th of May. 1 day before arrival i need to modify my stay due to very hectic traffic in Bali, traffic jamm is awful so i ask my wife to call the hotel. I requested not to cancel my reservation but to switch the date to 8th of May to avoid bad traffic jam as i bring 3 kids along with me. We check on Traveloka and Agoda, room is available on 8th of May so i think there wont be any problem to switch the date. But when we call reservation they cannot accomodate our request due to black out date, then we are redirected to Yudi their Duty Manager. I assume by talking to their higher level management will able to provide some solutions to our problem. Unfortunately this duty manager did nothing but rejecting our request with exact same reason. For information i book this room at 2.000.000 Idr ($160), while for 8th of May their room rate is below that price. This is very disapointing. What a shame, very good propert but not so good duty manager.

chunks.text: Saya menginap semalam di hotel ini, transit dari Bali. Kesan pertama saya, hotel ini terlihat bagus dan baru. Saya memasan 2 kamar Deluxe untuk saya dan keluarga. Kamar cukup saya rasa walau tidak bisa dikatakan luas...namun cukuplah, sesuai dengan harga yag dibayar. Kebersihan bagus...dan tersedia berbagai fasilitas layaknya hotel bintang 4. Pemandangan dari kamar, sangat menyegarkan...hamparan sawah dan pohon kelapa sepanjang mata memandang. Untuk makananan, rasanya sesuai dengan lidah saya alias enak. Baik makan malam maupun sarapan, cukup menggugah selera. saat saya menginap, ditawari dinner buffet seharga IDR 100,000/pax, saya rasa cukup baik dan sesuai dengan harga yang dibayar. Jika ingin kudapan dan ngopi, tersedia di lobby. sayang saya tidak sempat mencobanya, kelihatannya sih enak. namun apa boleh buat perut sudah kenyang dengan buffet dinner jadi tidak ada ruang untuk kudapan dan secangkir kopi. Secara umum hotel ini bagus dan memuaskan. hanya satu kekurangannya yaitu kurang kedap kamarnya. suara berisik dari lantai atas dan samping terdengar jelas. selain kekedapan ruangan, semuanya O.K. Anyway, saya menjadikan hotel ini pilihan pertama jika saya berkunjung ke Banyuwangi

chunks.summary: Semuanya enak dan kue paginya juga enak yang di reception , staffnya semua sangat profesional dan ramah.
chunks.text: Semuanya enak dan kue paginya juga enak yang di reception , staffnya semua sangat profesional dan ramah

chunks.summary: Dari banyak menu sarapan menurut saya onde2 adalah yg terbaik.
chunks.text: Dari banyak menu sarapan menurut saya onde2 adalah yg terbaik. Nilai terbaik menurut sy bahkan keluarga. View dari kamar/balcon/restaurant sangat bagus. Memuaskan utk view. Rasa dan menu sarpan perlu di perbaiki. Suara bising kendaraan dan tamu yg tidak di berikan standard maximum jam brp boleh melakukan aktifitas yg menggangu sepertinya tidak ada. Karaoke hingga lebih dari jam 11 malam. Org buka dan tutup pintu tengah malah dengan suara keras. Org berjalan dan berbicara di atas jam 11 malam. Sangat mengganggu. Mohon lbh di perhatikan oleh management karena ini bukan pertama saya menginap. Yang pertama sy puas. Utk sekarang saya berfikir kembali utk kembali menginap. 3 malam tiada waktu tanpa suara bising tengah malam

chunks.summary: Onde2nya terbaik dari semua menu sarapan dan view baik dari kamar, keluar kamar, restaurant apalagi rooftop.
chunks.text: Onde2nya terbaik dari semua menu sarapan dan view baik dari kamar, keluar kamar, restaurant apalagi rooftop. Bising kendaraan dan para tamu di tengah malam. Bahkan suara karaoke dari atas terdengar cukup mengganggu di tengah malam

chunks.summary: Anak saya senang menginap di hotel ini karena ada permainan-permainan yang bisa dimainkan.

chunks.summary: Excellent service provided by this hotel, start from the reception staff which was very welcoming and giving details about the marvelous hotel facilities.
chunks.text: Excellent service provided by this hotel, start from the reception staff which was very welcoming and giving details about the marvelous hotel facilities. The room was comfortable and most preferably clean. All the amenities are high quality. The food for our breakfast is also variable and taste amazing. What a great time to be in Banyuwangi!

chunks.text: hotel bersih, kamar cukup luas, nyaman, pemandangan bagus. amenities kamar mandi lengkap. sarapan cukup mahal dengan variasi makanan yg tdk terlalu banyak pilihan, tapi pemandangan dari restoran juara. ada jarak dari drop off sampai ke lobby. pada saat check in hanya ada 1 bellboy dan ada 3 mobil yg datang bersamaan. hanya ada 1 trolley besar dan saya dapet trolley kecil dengan barang yg banyak, diantaranya fragile, yg akhirnya saya bawa sendiri. saat check out pun antrian trolley lama, akhirnya saya bawa barang saya sendiri. bisa lebih diperhatikan

Breakfast taste can be improved, thanks to beverages machine they have tasty choco and coffee.

chunks.summary: you're looking for a brand-new, well-maintained, and strategically-located hotel.
chunks.text: you're looking for a brand-new, well-maintained, and strategically-located hotel. During my one night stay, I find the staff generally eager to serve, the bed very comfortable, and the room very clean. For less than half a million, this hotel really can't go wrong.

chunks.summary: Stayed here for 1 night during our road trip to Bali.
chunks.text: Stayed here for 1 night during our road trip to Bali. It was a very nice stay. Room is comfy, clean, and great. Breakfast is good. We also had a good time at the swimming pool. It was very nice to hit the water after a very long drive. Love this hotel and looking forward to be back here someday

chunks.summary: Saya cek in di tanggal 30 May 2022, dimana H - 2 Lebaran, yang memang sedang tinggi tingkat keterisian kamar.
chunks.text: Saya cek in di tanggal 30 May 2022, dimana H - 2 Lebaran, yang memang sedang tinggi tingkat keterisian kamar. Saya datang ke hotel sekitar jam 1 siang, ketika cek in, diberi tahu kalau kamar belum siap, jam 2 siang saya tanyakan lagi, belum siap juga, dan mau dikabari jika kamar sudah siap, pada akhirnya jam 3siang baru bisa masuk kamar. Saya minta ditempatkan dikamar yang Non smoking, tapi koridornya bau asap rokok. Komplain ke Front Offixe, akhirnya diganti kamar yang tidak bau asap rokok. Hotelnya bagus viewnya, kamar lumayan bersih, sarapan enak, hanya kurang bervariasi. Terima kasih

chunks.summary: I came one week before to the Kokoon Hotel.
chunks.text: I came one week before to the Kokoon Hotel. It was a very comfortable stay before because all of the crew of the Hotel were very friendly and helpful. The hotel is also very clean and modern, which is exactly my idea of a good hotel. After I arrived in Banyuwangi with a very early flight, the friendly lady (unfortunately I forgot her name) at check-in made it possible for me to move into my room earlier. The hotel manager can be proud of his crew! Should I come to Banyuwangi again, I will definitely stay at the Kokoon Hotel.

chunks.summary: I came to the Kokoon Hotel one week before my last stay.
chunks.text: I came to the Kokoon Hotel one week before my last stay. It was very comfortable and for this reason I came back.

Manajemen hotelnya kurang bagus sih ini, kasian staff nya, pasti kita menanyakan terus ke resepsionis. Manager hotelnya perlu review lagi ini. Saya tanya check out sama apa ada tambahan, dijawab tidak ada dengan enaknya. Kalian mau kami toleransi check in sampe nunggu 2 jam, tapi kami gak dapet tambahan waktu check out karena kesalahan kalian. Dahlah gak bakalan ke sini lagi.

chunks.summary: Hotel was nice, room was nice.
chunks.text: Hotel was nice, room was nice. However i asked for extra towels, i have never been asked to pay for extra towels, ever. And not to mentioned, the towels had a funny smell. And i booked 2 rooms. 1 room wasn't supplied with the toohtbursh, ... etc.. The breakfast was ok.. but my daughter had a diarrhea the next day , I'm guessing it's from consuming something there. Cause she said the salad tasted funny and it wasn't fresh. And then when i wanted to check out. The receptionist asked me to wait, they need to check my room make sure everything is ok, so if there'sanything they can charge me? That's very unprofessional, Dont worry i will not take and i have never taken anything from any hotels. I have never been asked that either. I usually say i want to check out and leave right away. This one is just different experience. Unbelievably unprofessional and unfriendly.

chunks.text:
We "transit" here during our vacation to Bali 

plus
+ room is quite spacious + clean
+ bathroom is also clean
+ AC is really cool.. I like it
+ breakfast is tasty
+ all staff are friendly
+ rooftop lounge is nice & has delicious food
+ relatively cheap, worth paying for

minus:
- breakfast is a bit limited variation
- in room food is a bit pricey
- location is a bit far from ketapang harbour ( 30 minutes normal traffic)

But overall it's a pleasant stay, we certainly will "transit" here again if we do overland trip to Bali someday

chunks.summary: Untuk lokasi sebenarnya cukup enak karena berada di samping jalan raya persis tidak perlu masuk ke dalam gang.
chunks.text: Untuk lokasi sebenarnya cukup enak karena berada di samping jalan raya persis tidak perlu masuk ke dalam gang. Namun memang kalau dari ketapang agak jauh sedikit karena dekat dengan kota. Untuk kamar sangat baik, tertata rapi dan yang saya sangat suka adalah semuanya sangat bersih, sangat nyaman untuk ditinggali. Overall sangat baik, sangat puas, dan pastinya akan kembali lagi jika bepergian ke banyuwangi kapan-kapan. Untuk sarapan menurut saya kurang banyak macam dan pilihannya. Seharusnya ditambahkan beberapa macam pilihan menu seperti di Bali, misalnya masakan western food, japanese food, dsb. Untuk kolam renang enak indoor, akan tetapi alangkah lebih baiknya jika diberi air hangat jadi tidak kedinginan.

chunks.summary: Stay di sini semalam saja dan overall bagus.
chunks.text: Stay di sini semalam saja dan overall bagus. Mulai dari check in sampe check out smooth. Kamar oke, suka view nya yg menghadap ke gunung. Staff ramah dan efficient. Minus nya hanya di breakfast saja. Western food kurang variasi dan pilihan makanan Indonesianya pun terbatas. Mungkin karena pandemi dan menyesuaikan dengan occupancy hotel. Namun semua staff di breakfast ramah dan selalu menawarkan bantuan, terima kasih. Terima kasih juga untuk Meri, trainee yg kami temui saat breakfast yg selalu make sure kita memiliki pengalaman stay yg nyaman.

chunks.summary: It was good and good service too.
chunks.text: It was good and good service too

chunks.summary: Arguably the best hotel in Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Arguably the best hotel in Banyuwangi. I enjoyed every single experience from checked in to check-out. The view is unbeatable, food is great. Fitness facility is good as expected. A totally relaxing stay. Can't wait to visit Kokoon again. Thank you! A bit concerned for your improvement: internet speed is a bit slow and disconnected for a while. Balcony room is very nice 👍🏽 but less insulation. I keep hearing car/bike noises all the time.

1. Telfon konfirmasi chkout 30 menit sblum jam 12. Padahal sy chcking jam 11 lewat malam hari, jdi belum 12 jam saya di hotel, sementara yg saya tau kalau hotel biasanya ada late chckout, atau di chrge kalau lewat brpa jam. 2. Saya datang jam 11 malam lewat didepan hanya ada 1 security, dan tidak membantu sama sekali, senyum, sapa salam juga tidak, kami membawa barang kami sendiri ke kamar. 3. Saya pesan dan bayar Kamar King Size, tapi yg saya dapatkan twin yg digabung. Mungkin jika memang king bed tidak tersedia, baiknya konfirmasi kepada konsumen. Lebih ditingkatkan lagi komunikasi penyampaian informasi, senyum, sapa salam, keramahan, basa basi kepada tamu tidak cuek dll. Mungkin bisa dicontoh dri beberapa hotel di bali, yg sangat friendly, Helpful dan mungkin responsibility dari kryawannya. Karna best hospitality rapat bersaing jika best service. Terimakasih

Selain view nya bagus, pelayanannya ramah, tapi kemaren lupa untuk menawarkan welcome drink, karena pada saat menginap pertama kali dikasih minuman tradisional. Untuk kamar tidak mengecewakan yaitu bagus, rapi dan bersih. Untuk breakfast rasa makanannya enak namun kurang bervariatif. Menunya hampir sama seperti dulu saat menginap pertama kali.

chunks.summary: A magnificient hotel with a good design, has a spacious lobby and a luurious design, easy arrangement of guest accessibility from the basement to the rooftop.
chunks.text: A magnificient hotel with a good design, has a spacious lobby and a luurious design, easy arrangement of guest accessibility from the basement to the rooftop. The rooms are spacious, clean, the design is modern, and there is no noise from the net room, the hotel staff is also very good, the cleaning room serice is also very good. A delicious and aried breakfast menu, with views of the mountains and rice fields. A magnificent hotel and tallest building in the middle of Banyuwangi city with a rooftop that can enjoy sunrise and sunset views.

chunks.summary: I have stayed at the Kokoon 5 or 6 times over the last couple of years.
chunks.text:
I have stayed at the Kokoon 5 or 6 times over the last couple of years. For me, the standout features are as follows:
Food - very delicious
Staff - super helpful, super friendly, and remember me. Location - very handy to the airport, good views of Bali to the east, and Mt Ijen to the west. Hotel - clean, modern, and new
I'm looking forward to my next stay.

chunks.text: Kokoon has exceeded my expectation. The new hotel was very clean, good looking and functional design with plenty of outdoor space to enjoy the fresh air. Breakfast was delicious and we particularly loved the rooftop lounge. The drinks are nice and well priced.

chunks.summary: Kokoon Hotel, hotel yang bagus dan masih baru.
chunks.text: Kokoon Hotel, hotel yang bagus dan masih baru. Kamar sangat bersih, bangunan arsitektur yang modern dan urban namun banyak open space nya sehingga kita bisa menikmati udara segar dan pemandangan pegunungan Banyuwangi. Shower nya kencang dan kamar mandi kamarnya compact, desain keren. Service sangat baik, protokol kesehatan sangat baik, respon dan kelancaran check in check out sangat baik. Kami sangat senang menghabiskan waktu di rooftop lounge untuk minum dan ngobrol. Minuman beragam dan ruangan indoor serta outdoor space nya bagus. Mungkin kalau tambahin lebih banyak taneman lebih oke. Sarapan juga enak dan lengkap.

chunks.text: The design of the hotel, room and facilities, especially wooden sliding doors which hide a bathroom and balcony. Friendly restaurant staffs and their service. Quality of breakfast although not enough varieties. View from a rooftop bar and the garden in front of the building. Unfriendly receptionists. Cleaning was not less good (there're mass of hair in the corner of a bathroom). Swimming pool was not very attractive.

Untuk sarapan menu dan ragam nya kurang banyak. Tetapi dalam pelayanan ada peningkatan untuk kunjungan kami yg kedua ini di restoran sarapan. Mantap!

chunks.summary: I chose this hotel because of the design and good feedback of guests.
chunks.text: I chose this hotel because of the design and good feedback of guests. As expected, the hotel offered us a pleasant atmosphere with a quality service. I love the wooden sliding doors which hide a bathroom and balcony. The breakfast is good enough and the staff are all friendly and helpful. I didn't use a swimming pool and rooftop bar since we spend more time for sightseeing.

chunks.summary: Kami keluarga dengan anak kecil 7 & 9 th.
chunks.text: Kami keluarga dengan anak kecil 7 & 9 th. Stay di Family Suite, isi 2 ranjang King Size Bed. Kamar luas dan bersih, nyaman sesuai dengan gambar di Agoda. Hotel keliatannya cukup baru, jadi gedung dan dekornya modern. Ada rooftop paling atas, pemandangan bagus. View dari kamar juga bagus, saya dapat view ke belakang Hotel,  pemandangan kebun/pohon kelapa, sawah dan gunung, bagus! Lokasi strategis di jalan utama, tapi agak jauh dari Pelabuhan Gilimanuk (sktr 20-30mnt perjalanan lancar), melewati tengah kota. Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi!

Sehingga membuat mual. Tapi overall makanannya enak. Untuk ke kurangannya mungkin di pelayanan kolam renang tidak ada petugasnya sehingga mau meminta handuk selesai renang tidak tersedia dan harus telpon ke receptionis hotel serta pada saat mau check out proses check outnya lama, untuk konfirmasi pengecekan kamar

chunks.summary:
I'm staying for 3 nights taking 1 junior suite room, 2 family room, and 1 deluxe room
Some pros
1.
chunks.text:
I'm staying for 3 nights taking 1 junior suite room, 2 family room, and 1 deluxe room
Some pros
1. The Hotel is new, so relatively clean
2. High building, you can get a new scenery and perspective of Banyuwangi area
3. Food quite ok
4. The staff is nice and friendly
5. They provide electric car charging station 

Cons
1. A blood stain in 1 of the room! And looks like they don't change the bed sheet due to low occupancy, my driver said he had problem on his first night because he got rash from the sheets
2. They don't ready for a lot of customer, they don't refill the breakfast. I get in the restaurant at 9 Am and they already run out of some foods (including eggs!)
3. I have a dolce gusto coffee machine in my room, but they run out of capsules in my 2nd day of stay so the cleaner boy are taking it from another room. It completely run out during my last day of stay
4. They don't have dedicated service lift to bring your luggage, so expect to wait longer for the lift when it check out or check in time
5. The area is not well located, so if you don't have a dedicated transportation you will have some problem... No atm or groceries nearby
6. Slow internet speed
7. Lobby is crowded with people parking, while the basement is relatively empty? People even park in the area for disable people by the direction from security

chunks.summary: Positive: smooth check in process, helpful and friendly service by Front office staff/David, spacious room with nice mountain view, good range of food selection for breakfast.
chunks.text: Positive: smooth check in process, helpful and friendly service by Front office staff/David, spacious room with nice mountain view, good range of food selection for breakfast. Room to improve: staff to handle better queque when giving service during breakfast, i was quequing in front of cake/bread counter when another guest cut in front of me and asked to staff and was also directly served by the staff. More clear marking for queque and staff also serve guest on first come first serve basis might avoid this inconvenient situation. Pool on roof top lounge seems not clean. In house tourist service info to share latest update on what to do, see on Banyuwangi and surroundings would be very helpful to visitors to plan longer stay in hotel.

chunks.summary: I have good experience during my stay here.
chunks.text: I have good experience during my stay here. The hotel condition is new and nice interior decorative and many spot to chill. They have rooftop bar on 16th floor but didn't have a chance to enjoy because only short visit but I would love to go back next time. The breakfast is good, many option for Indonesian food and limited selection for western e.g. cereal, pancake are available. They made pre cooked omelet and still fresh so no queueing. The staffs are warm and friendly and especially for Gadis, the girl from Ijen Restaurant. I stayed in family room with two ing bed size. I wish more tea and coffee selection in the room. The cleaness of the elevator need to be improved. I got in on wet floor elevator, it seems bunch of people use the elevator previously after swim but no manner to dry themselve before get in to the elevator. Anyway I would definitely come back eventhough the distance to Ketapang port is approx 30 minm

One note for the hotel cleaness to be maintained especially in the elevator. I got in with wet floor because previous person got in wet aftet pool.

chunks.summary: Stayed here during my road trip to Bali, 1 one diring departure and another on our way home.
chunks.text: Stayed here during my road trip to Bali, 1 one diring departure and another on our way home. Book 2 connecting rooms, we are 5 adults and 3 kids. Room is very comfortable, its clean, its bright and spacious, bed was comfy too and there are small couch in twin bed rooms which can accomodate baby to sleep on. Bathroom was clean, separated between shower chambers and closet, good waterpressure. The only facility we tried was swimming pool, adequate size, it was indoor pool. They have rooftop lounge along woth observatory deck, looks nice but havent tried it. Staff was friendly and helpfull, check in and check out process was efficient. The only minus point is lavk soundproofness, this hotel dony use carpets in any area so it bit noisy. I love this hotel tho, will choose Kookon if i visiting Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: At first, we are really excited to try this hotel as our transit hotel.
chunks.text: At first, we are really excited to try this hotel as our transit hotel. We checked in around 10 pm. We upgraded our room to family room because we traveled with 3 children. As soon as we checked in, I already asked them to provide me a small table and a single chair for kids' online school tomorrow morning. They said yes but nothing came until we checked out. Sadly, one of our kids had to do the online school on the bed and she accidently dropped her tea (very very soft color, nothing compared to pee color) on the bed. The hotel charged us to pay 350,000. In their defense, they said the stain is hard to remove. As for I know, it only needed just a little detergent or even just shampoo/soal to remove it. And all this accident would also not happen if they provide us the chair and table we require. One more thing, they would not spare any free mineral water except what you got in your room, not even 1 bottle. We would not mention this if this is a hostel or a budget hotel. But we are talking about 4-star hotel here. In conclusion, they are just a well-furnished new hotel with a super lousy service. They greed on every cents of your money. Make sure if you bring your children here, you bring enough water because there's no minimarket in neighbor distance. And make sure your kids don't spill anything or even pee on the bed.

chunks.summary: Amazing, magnificent, and superb hotel with complete & perfect staycation facilities and hospitality...
chunks.text: Amazing, magnificent, and superb hotel with complete & perfect staycation facilities and hospitality... They done really great health protocol that obviously made u feel safe! Amazing pool, gym and sauna! Love the vibe, architectures, design, specially our room with sunrise van java balcony from the Bali Strait view... Food just amazing! Surprise with hommie ps3 racing console with home theater speaker, dingdong (our childhood memories) and observation deck!!! I think this the best luxury hotel & villas in regency not as a city but town or regency in Indonesia! Gonna be comeback as soon as possible!! Keep up the good work to feel those warm, nice and sweetheart hotel crew!

chunks.summary: We loveee this place.
chunks.text: We loveee this place. We were traveling from Jakarta and we stopped in Semarang and Surabaya. From a three star hotel to five star hotel, this is the best hotel so far. The room is so clean and spacious, no carpet, they are strictly following the health procedures for COVID-19, good breakfast, and the most important thing is super friendly staff! They are so helpful and initiative. Surely will go back again to this hotel everytime we're in Banyuwangi!

chunks.summary: Menginap di kamar 1106, seneng banget bisa dapat view pemandangan hijau dan biru bersamaan, lautan Bali terlihat dari sini dan sebagian kecil pengunungan juga terlihat, bisa lihat matahari terbit juga, Secara pelayanan sih nyaman tapi ada beberapa staff hotel yang kurang ramah, selain itu rasa makanannya kurang menurut saya, waktu makan malam cumi masak balinya masih alot, lalu ikan dorrynya kurang seasoning jadi amisnya berasa masihan, Paginya waktu breakfast, makan spaghetti entah bumbu apa soalnya nemu cengkeh dimienya, dan ginger yang dicop kecil gak terlalu kelihatan jadi kemakan dan musti melepeh makanan pas lg enak makan 😂 rasanya gimana gitu, selain itu sekelas hotel bintang 4 saladnya gak ada, cuma buah potong aja, biasanya dihotel bintang serupa ada saladnya sih biarpun dikit, enggak tahu mungkin akan coba hotel di Banyuwangi yang lain untuk padanan apakah mmg disini hotel-hotel umumnya demikian.
chunks.text: Menginap di kamar 1106, seneng banget bisa dapat view pemandangan hijau dan biru bersamaan, lautan Bali terlihat dari sini dan sebagian kecil pengunungan juga terlihat, bisa lihat matahari terbit juga, Secara pelayanan sih nyaman tapi ada beberapa staff hotel yang kurang ramah, selain itu rasa makanannya kurang menurut saya, waktu makan malam cumi masak balinya masih alot, lalu ikan dorrynya kurang seasoning jadi amisnya berasa masihan, Paginya waktu breakfast, makan spaghetti entah bumbu apa soalnya nemu cengkeh dimienya, dan ginger yang dicop kecil gak terlalu kelihatan jadi kemakan dan musti melepeh makanan pas lg enak makan 😂 rasanya gimana gitu, selain itu sekelas hotel bintang 4 saladnya gak ada, cuma buah potong aja, biasanya dihotel bintang serupa ada saladnya sih biarpun dikit, enggak tahu mungkin akan coba hotel di Banyuwangi yang lain untuk padanan apakah mmg disini hotel-hotel umumnya demikian. Updated Pengalaman menginap kedua dapat kamar dilantai 7, di 723 dengan view ke arah barat melihat gunung. Menginap selama 2 malam tapi condimen seperti air mineral teh dllnya tidak diganti dengan yang baru. Lalu ada pengalaman yang tidak mengenakkan sih menurut saya, waktu cek out kamar memang di Kokoon itu kita diminta untuk menunggu untuk di cek kan kamarnya oleh pegawainya katanya "kalau ada barang-barang yg tertinggal" setelah menunggu kurleb 5 menit, kami diberitahu kalau tidak ada yg tertinggal dan kami dipersilahkan pulang, Nah ini yg mengurangi rating dari awalnya saya beri bintang 🌟🌟🌟🌟 menjadi bintang 🌟🌟🌟 saja karena waktu dijalan kami ditelpon apakah kami membawa handuk kecil milik hotel td? Hallo bapak ibu, waktu cekout apa tidak sekalian di cek kelengkapan kamarnya, kenapa kami seakan dituduh mengambil handuk coba? Sampai ditanya detail saya taruh handuknya dimana 😂astaga, saya bilang ya bareng handuk yg lainnya lah, katanya akan kami konfirmasikan lagi ke petugasnya katanya gak ditemukan waktu tadi, lha kenapa baru bilang ketika kami sudah dijalan, gak sekalian waktu kami diminta menunggu disana tadi biar sekalian cek sama-sama kalau perlu, Pegawainya yang gak profesional sekali. Kerja itu yang teliti dicek satu-satu, ini main nuduh ke customer juga tanpa minta maaf lagi si mbanya yg telpon. Jujur saya kecewa sekali. Baru pertama nginep dihotel yg waktu cekout disuruh nunggu, waktu udah dijalan balik masih juga ditanyain bawa handuk hotel yg kecil bu? 😂😂 Hotel bintang empat kok begini.

chunks.summary: Spend 2 nights here with my room in 10th floor.
chunks.text: Spend 2 nights here with my room in 10th floor. Has a very narrow balcony overlooking the city. View was quite nice.. check-in was easy, staffs were very friendly and helpful. Room was great, bed was comfy, the room was almost identical with the design in dialoog. Amenity was enough, bathroom was standard. Visit the pool, water was interestingly cold, probably it has something to do with the sauna at the locker but sauna wasnt working during my stay. The gym was rather small and not appealing. Visit the restaurant, really love the chicken satay and beef satay, it was very tender and delicious. Also tried the sosis solo and the cheesecake, its not the best i've tried tho.. They have an observation deck at 16th floor which is the rooftop, where you can have an almost-360⁰-view and also another restaurant there which i didnt try. Not a fast check-out, they asked us to wait for a while, but give a heartwarming chocolate cookies as a goodbye gift.

chunks.summary: Персонал очень компетентный!
chunks.text: Персонал очень компетентный! Этот отель заслуживает 5 заезд ! Многие отелям есть чему у них поучиться ! Даже моя просьба найти витамин С в 22:00, что бы не заболеть после вулкана и холода , была исполнена ! Ну или попросив постирать мою одежду стаф уже через 2 мин был около двери ! По отелю , стилю и чистоте... Я перфекционист в вопросе чистоты. Идеальная чистота ! Номера в классическом стиле без излишеств! Отель совсем новый как я понимаю ! Все пахнем парфюмом и деревом ! Прекрасный спа Сауна , тренажёрный зал и вишенка на торте это массаж ! Даже на Бали посетив массу «раскрученных» спа, такого уровня не встречала ! Кухня ... Хорошая , предложений в меню не много, но если уж чего-то сильно хочется вас услышать и попробуют угодить! Я очень советую вам его посетить, особенно если хочется качественного отдыха после долгих путешествий !

chunks.summary: Ke Banyuwangi?
chunks.text: Ke Banyuwangi? Pastikan Anda menginap di hotel Kokoon ini! Dari awal tiba, hotel ini langsung memberikan pelayanan yg maksimal. Mereka menawarkan bantuan utk kami dapat menyimpan frozen food kami di chiller/ freezer mereka, karena kami kebetulan road trip Bali- Jakarta. Proses check-in yg mudah. Lobby yg nyaman dan aromatherapy yg wangi. Hotel ini punya indoor swimming pool di lantai 2 dan jg fasilitas spa. Jika Anda ke lantai 16 tersedia lounge bar dan pada rooftop, Anda akan dimanjakan dgn pemandangan kota Banyuwangi dan selat Bali. Benar-benar baguss. Anda jg bisa lihat sunrise di sini. Kereennn.. Suasana kamar jg nyaman, bersih, amenitiesnya jg wangi, enak deh pokoknya. Sandal kamarnya, bermotif batik. 😁 Sayangnya kami hanya menginap 1 malam saja karena harus melanjutkan perjalanan. Kami betah di sini lama-lama. ☺️ Breakfast ada di lantai 3, mulai dari pukul 06.00-10.00, Anda akan langsung dilayani oleh staffs yg sangat ramah, cekatan, dan very helpful n thoughtful. Mbak Fingky salah satunya yg membuat kami beberapa kali salute dgn pelayanannya. Top class. 👍 Hospitality service inilah yg membuat kami betah dan nyaman berada di hotel ini. Bahkan hotel bintang 5 sekalipun, banyak yg tidak memberikan layanan seperti ini. Hotel ini give their best service we've ever experienced. 👍 Klo ada yg mungkin bisa diperbaiki, mungkin masalah shower yg airnya kadang dingin, kadang panas, kurang stabil. Jika ada kesempatan, kami jg ingin mencoba menginap di Kokoon Surabaya. Well done management Kokoon! 👍👍

chunks.text: The place is very modern and great service. The only reason i gave a 3 stars because the 5th floor is bloody haunted. Told the manager about this and he said that many people complain on that floor. The manager should tell us earlier before giving us that bloody room.

chunks.summary: Family roomnya bersih dan cukup luas untuk ber 4.
chunks.text: Family roomnya bersih dan cukup luas untuk ber 4. View cukup ok, pemandangan sawah dan gunung (kalau ga ketutup kabut). Sayang sabunnya tidak diisi penuh jadi besoknya waktu mandi sempet kehabisan. Untung bawa sabun sendiri. Mgkn karena bukan model tube yg bisa dibawa2, melainkan nempel di tempat sabun (ga bisa dicabut) jd lupa ngisi. Makanan cukup mahal dan rasa standart. Nyobain all you can eat tapi yg enak cm dikit, lainnya biasa aja. Onde2nya enak sih. Kolam renangnya duingin bangett. Dan pas kesana airnya butek kotor, ampun dah. Ruang gantinya sih bagus, bersih dan ada locker2nya. Kids room terlalu kecil, cm isi meja, kertas gambar, tv dan beberapa buku cerita. Fasilitas utk anak kurang sekali, jd mereka cepet bosan nginap sana. Semoga kedepan fasilitas bisa ditambah

chunks.text: Karena saya orang Indo, saya review pakai bahasa Indo ya haha.. Ini hotel dari sekian hotel di Banyuwangi yang paling best lah menurut saya.. Semuanya nyaman, apalagi servis nya duhhh, super excellent! Dari Receptionis (saya lupa nama nya, pokoknya mba nya tinggi haha) trus petugas bersih kamar mas Wiwid, you re so kindly, kemudian mba Rachma yang menyambut dengan hangat dan senyum manis setiap pagi sebelum masuk room restaurant, kemudian ada mas Frans dan mba Indah yang selalu tulus hati melayani setiap permintaan customer.. Sangat menyenangkan dan hari ini Sabtu 11 September 2021 adalah ke 4 kali nya saya menginap di sini.. Dan setiap bertugas di Banyuwangi, pasti nya akan menginap disini lagi.. Tolong mba mas di atas jangan di ganti yaa, mereka yang membuat customer betah dan nyaman nginap disini lhoo anw, tentunya mba mas yg alin juga sih, but nginap 4 malam disini rasanya kurang kalau servis nya selalu the best gini.. BRAVO KOKOON BANYUWANGI, YOU THE BEST HOTEL!!

1. Pelayanan buruk, check in harusnya jam 14.00. Saya jam 13.00 bersama keluarga besar udah sampe hotel dulu dari SURABAYA tetapi dikabarin jam 15.00 baru bisa check in dan tidak diberi tambahan waktu untuk check out. Padahal di hotel malang bintang 5 itu diberi waktu tambahan dgn alasan apapun. Katanya saya di telfon receiptonist jam 15.00 ternyata gak ditelfon makanya saya telfon berkali kali. Sampe jam 15.30 an baru masuk hotel. Tidak berperikemanusiaan maaf :) 2. Tidak ada breakfast dengan menu daging, parah! Bintang 4 kok tidak ada menu daging 3. Pelayan waktu breakfast aku tanyain ini croffle apa waffle dia jawabnya croffle padahal waffle. Ini saya  ng test

chunks.summary: Banyuwangi is a warm weather city which you need a hotel with good cooling system.
chunks.text: Banyuwangi is a warm weather city which you need a hotel with good cooling system. Kokoon has weak A/C and can't cool down the room temperature. Breakfast is insufficient. Omlet egg is cold. Other food is tasteless like the chef has covid and can't taste his meals. The hall in front of room is very noisy in the morning. You can hear clearly people yell, scream and walking. Rooftop is like a ghosttown. Nobody was there even waiters.

chunks.summary: I love to stay at Kokoon Hotel.
chunks.text: I love to stay at Kokoon Hotel. The room is big n nice. Bed n pillows are comfy. Breakfast has lots of varieties. Nice gym n pool. The staff are friendly n helpful. Please put shampoo n soap at pool changing room. Overall , i had a very satisfying experience and definitelly will be back 👍

chunks.summary: Ik was hier 1 nacht.
chunks.text: Ik was hier 1 nacht. Zeer ruime en zeer schone kamer. Prima bedden. Wifi was goed. Er was koffiezet-apparatuur. Personeel vriendelijk en behulpzaam voor zover nodig. Uitgebreid buffet-ontbijt. Het hotel ligt op plm 20 minuten rijden van de haven Ketapang. Het hotel is nieuw. Aangenaam verblijf gehad. Geen negatieve zaken.

chunks.text: Before you visited Bali, you can feel the atmosphere in here. Kokoon is one of the luxury hotel in Banyuwangi. The room and bathroom are spacious and bright, the indoor swimming pool (2nd floor) and the rooftop bar (16th floor) very entertaint with minimalis and modern design. There were games station at the bar. Altough we get the ala carte breakfast served in the box (during covid19 pandemic) but the nasi lemak ayam kalio is the best, the chicken is so tender and juicy.

chunks.summary: stayed here only for sleeping transit after long ride.
chunks.text: stayed here only for sleeping transit after long ride. at first it feels like this hotel quite far (from the ferry port) , because i believe these days people stays at banyuwangi for a transit to/from bali, but it all paid after we see and arrived at the hotel, very good service, great staffs, great protocol (for the pandemic era), and quite clean 👍  we regret that we didn't take the breakfast package (because we arrived at 11PM and will take aerly check out for another ride) , their breakfast looks interesting for a 4star hotel, i take a small hotel tour in the morning by myself, and their facilites looks good, great view (no mather what are your room facing, all is green + mountain/sea), overall, we really enjoy the stay, and surely will pick this hotel when we go to banyuwangi again!

chunks.summary: We booked this hotel during our trip to bali without any expectations, but once we arrived the hotel surprised us.
chunks.text: We booked this hotel during our trip to bali without any expectations, but once we arrived the hotel surprised us. The hotel is beautiful inside out, interior and exterior. Room was great, bed was comfortable, room service and housekeeping responded well, pool also good even its only indoor pool. The ijen restaurant served us great, the food also delicious although they still have limited menu. The hotel worth a come back we even stayed there again when we came back to java island.

Kamarnya bersih banget, wangi, nyaman banget!! betah banget deh.. oia, protokol kesehatan disini bagus bgt!! dapat care box yg isinya hand sanitizer dan masker. trus fasilitas disini juga oke banget. ada view deck di lantai 16, bisa liat kota banyuwangi dr rooftop, trus bisa dinner beratapkan langit Pokoknya keren banget.. klo nanti ke Banyuwangi, akan nginep sini lagi

Breakfast was average taste with not so many choices (especially if you are looking for non-Indonesia food), however the service provided by the restaurant staff was excellent.

Minusnya: saya stay di deluxe balcony, kamar kurang kedap suara, suara kendaraan dari luar bisa kedengaran jelas dari kamar.
