Semua stafnya ramah dan helpful banget. Dan yang paling penting, protokol kesehatannya sangat diperhatikan disini. Kolam renang, sauna, makanan.. semuanya oke banget deh. InsyaAllah akan kembali lagi ke Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: We booked previously another hotel for our 5 day stay in Banyuwangi, but when we arrived, the facility was far below acceptable so we checked out immediately and began looking for another hotel.
chunks.text: We booked previously another hotel for our 5 day stay in Banyuwangi, but when we arrived, the facility was far below acceptable so we checked out immediately and began looking for another hotel. We remembered seeing the Kokoon Hotel further back and decided to give it a try. Obviously we didn't have a reservation when we greeted by the hotel receptionist. We booked for two nights, but after checking into our room and looking at the amenities, we quickly decided to extend the stay for the entire 5 days. We are glad that we did! The hospitality was beyond expectations. The entire staff from receptionist, security, concierge, wait staff, and cleaning crew were professional and friendly - always greeting us with a warm smile. In addition, we were greeted by the manager of the hotel during our first morning breakfast. We will definitely stay at the Kokoon again whenever we visit Banyuwangi. Thanks for the morning exercise, cookies, and family ambiance.

chunks.summary: It was the first time I visited Banyuwangi and I chose Kokoon Hotel.
chunks.text: It was the first time I visited Banyuwangi and I chose Kokoon Hotel. The hospitality is outstanding, all the staff are so friendly and helpful. The last day I stayed there was a flood all over the basement and lobby so there was no breakfast in the morning, but they showed the apology by giving us free dinner. The room is clean and cozy, the wifi is fast, the gym and pool also good. Overall staying in Kokoon Hotel one of the best experience I’ve ever had while staying in Banyuwangi. Thanks!

chunks.text: Saya menginqp di Kamar Keluarga 2 king size bedroom dalam satu kamar. Desain lobi, bale bengong sebelum masuk lobi, perpaduan modern dan alam di lobi dan sekitarmya bagus. Kamar bafus sekali dengan kayu2 MoF del modern. Harmonis sekali perpaduan2nya. Pintu kamar mandinya unik. Air kamar mandi segar bersih, air panasnya bekerja dengan baik. TV nya lengkap teelihat sekali HD nya. Sarapan nya bervariasi. Kamar kami menghadap ke gunung, indah sekali. Parkiran cukup luas. Ini hotel bagus. Kettika check out, kami diminta menunggu agak lama untuk stafnya memeriksa kamar kami.

chunks.summary: The room was clean and spacious.
chunks.text: The room was clean and spacious. If there hadn’t been the flooding incident that forced the hotel to turn off the electricity, it would have been a nice stay. I didn’t blame the hotel for the incident, but their slow action to make us feel comfortable and cared for in the most inconvenient condition was unfortunate. Earlier in the morning we have no way of communicating with the hotel staff to get an update and they didn’t update us either, the lobby phone was not active and the WhatsApp message was not delivered. What was promised to be a 30 minutes black out turned out way longer than that. We were practically stranded. I booked a room with no breakfast as we planned to leave early in the morning but with the incident we couldn’t leave the room and they didn’t offer us any breakfast as compensation and didn’t suggest to have breakfast in our room (I was the one who initiated to have the breakfast sent up with a feeling of irritation as they suggested us to go down to level 3 while I was at level 15), did they expect us to go down to level 3 for breakfast and go up to level 15 again? They definitely didn’t think this through which means they are not trained for immediate actions in emergency situations. Forced to go down 15 level to lobby for check out was definitely not a good experience for me who has a pre existing leg condition. I still suffer from pain and swelling after that.

chunks.summary: The room was clean and spacious, the hotel was actually quite nice.
chunks.text: The room was clean and spacious, the hotel was actually quite nice. If there hadn’t been the an incident that forced the hotel to turn off the electricity, it would have been a nice stay. I didn’t blame the hotel for the incident, but their slow action to make us feel comfortable and cared for in the most inconvenient condition was unfortunate. Earlier in the morning we have no way of communicating with the hotel staff to get an update and they didn’t update us either, the lobby phone was not active and the WhatsApp messages were not delivered. What was promised to be a 30 minutes black out turned out way longer than that (black out occured at around 3pm, they announced it via speaker, woke us all up and I should note that they didn’t apologize for having to turn off the power). We were practically stranded. I booked a room with no breakfast as we planned to leave early in the morning but with the incident we couldn’t leave the room and they didn’t offer us any breakfast as compensation and didn’t suggest to have breakfast in our room (I was the one who initiated to have the breakfast sent up with a feeling of irritation as they suggested us to go down to level 3 while I was at level 15), did they expect us to go down the stairs to level 3 for breakfast and go up to level 15 again? They definitely didn’t think this through which means they are not trained for emergency situations. Forced to go down 15 level to lobby for check out was definitely not a good experience for me who has a pre existing leg condition. I still suffer from pain and swelling after that. Hotel management need to think about where they should put their power centre away from the river. Smh.

Thank you Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi!

chunks.text: Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi menurut saya salah satu hotel yang super kece pemandangannya. Dari rooftop kita disuguhkan dengan pemandangan 3 gunung di sebelah barat, serta ada selat dan pulau Bali di sisi timur. Sunrise point nya juga sangat keren sekali. Pelayanannya sangat ramah, dan juga kebersihan sangat terjaga. Masalah protokol kesehatan juga sangat ketat.

chunks.summary: Staying at Kokoon Banyuwangi for more than one time and this hotel never fails me.
chunks.text: Staying at Kokoon Banyuwangi for more than one time and this hotel never fails me. Definitely come back to this hotel if visit Banyuwangi again.

chunks.summary: Plus = Clean Room, Comfy Bed, GOOD Services to cater all our needs.
chunks.text: Plus = Clean Room, Comfy Bed, GOOD Services to cater all our needs. Minus = There’s a slight sewage smells leaking out from the bathroom. Prolly need bigger exhaust.

chunks.summary: Pengalaman yang sangat tak terlupakan, terima kasih atas service nya.
chunks.text: Pengalaman yang sangat tak terlupakan, terima kasih atas service nya. Staf ramah dan cekatan.

chunks.summary: Did not expect such hospitality in this small town of Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Did not expect such hospitality in this small town of Banyuwangi. Everything is just super awesome. The services is 2 thumbs up. The room and comfy and importantly clean provided by the hotel. The one part that need some improvement is the bathroom exhaust, prolly need bigger as i notice there’s a slight smell coming up.

chunks.summary: The room are clean and spacious, the location located near the city center and ferry port.
chunks.text: The room are clean and spacious, the location located near the city center and ferry port. Will comeback here if travel to Banyuwangi.

And i love the design and the things that they used there. The staff are friendly and helpfull. But mayabe lack of protocol in the front door. Maybe during this pandemic they dont have enough staff. But overall we love to stay here.

chunks.text: Hotel bintang 4 rasa bintang 5, bangunan interior baru, semua serba fresh.. kebersihan dan kerapihan setiap sudut membuat liburan saya di banyuwangi semakin berkesan. Peralatan di room juga sangat lengkap, ada peralatan mandi, kamar bersih, ada minibar dan hayrdriyer semua lengkap. Next time pasti bakal balik lagi.

chunks.summary: Having a short trip to Banyuwangi and try this newly hotel.
chunks.text: Having a short trip to Banyuwangi and try this newly hotel. And this hotel are the highest hotel among the others. The staff are friendly and helpful. And the room are already sanitized and clean.

chunks.summary: nice room, but you can hear your neighbor bathing, walking dst.
chunks.text: nice room, but you can hear your neighbor bathing, walking dst

chunks.summary: The beds were large.
chunks.text: The beds were large. We love the Family Room option, it's really a draw card. Not many hotels have this option. We are family of 4 kids so this option really suit us well. With 4 pax free breakfast, and only our 7 year old paid for half of the price, it was really fair. The breakfast was splendid. The options were varied and all tasted wonderful (although they gave me margarine instead of butter to company my croissant :), maybe next time they need to understand the difference between butter and margarine), the covid protocols were taken seriously, the staff served what we chose. The seat position were well managed. The staff at the breakfast restaurant were all 5 stars! At our check out, the reception gave us a pack of chocolate chip cookies which my son love, and she managed to have a chat about the hotel and what needed to be improved. We love Kokoon and will stay there again InshaaAllah if we come to Banyuwangi again. Hopefully with the same friendly rate! The parking lot on the basement can only be reached by stairs and off the lobby. Not an easy access

chunks.text: We had a problem with noise from room beside us. When they take shower, we can hear the sound quite clearly so I think need to improve on sound reducer or something. It’s a bit annoying.

chunks.text: Luv this hotel,very clean, great staff with smile face and good service. The chef made red velvet cheese for breakfast..the taste was awesome.. Cant wait to be back

chunks.text: I made this booking because i was unsatisfied with last hotel that i stayed. I choose kokoon because i passed by this hotel several times before go to djawatan and alas purwo..turns out, i luv this hotel. Very clean ,great staff, luxury room, good lounge and they made best cheese red velvet cake at breakfast time...thanks to the chef . Definetely will be back to stay on this hotel.

chunks.summary: I have no doubt to recomend this accommodation for all traveller who seeking for comfort, cleanlines and high standart of hospitality as well as their food were so marvelous.

chunks.summary: I was staying in this hotel for a business trip.
chunks.text: I was staying in this hotel for a business trip. All the staffs are friendly, The quality of food is good, near to the airport only 20 minute. They have a rooftop in 16th floor with a very nice view. I will definitely recommend this hotel to all my friends. Thanks Kokoon!

chunks.summary: Staycation di Banyuwangi cek.
chunks.text: Staycation di Banyuwangi cek. Salah satu hotel terbaik di banyuwangi dengan Julukan Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi. Dengan Pemandangan sunrise dan sunset yang bagus banget ketika cuaca bagus. Spot favorit melihat pemandangan disini adalah di rooftop. Pelayanan sangat baik, Staf sangat ramah, kamar sangat bersih, menu di restaurant sangat enak, pelayan penyajian restaurant sangat baik. Bagi kalian yang ke Banyuwangi, tempat ini bisa menjadi referensi ketika liburan atau sedang perjalanan ke banyuwangi untuk staycatian dan menginap disini.

chunks.summary: Mantap nih salah satu hotel menarik di Banyuwangi dg view pemandangan dari ketinggian roftopnya sangat cantik apalagi pelayanannya juga sangat ramah sekali, tempatnya juga bersih dan makanannya juga enak!!

chunks.summary: Hotelnya bagus, kamar modern , bersih, kasur nya sangat amat nyaman, breakfast enak, memang lokasi agak jauh 5-10 menit dr kota tapi cukup bagus, view kamar ganjil sangat cantik ke gn ijen.
chunks.text: Hotelnya bagus, kamar modern , bersih, kasur nya sangat amat nyaman, breakfast enak, memang lokasi agak jauh 5-10 menit dr kota tapi cukup bagus, view kamar ganjil sangat cantik ke gn ijen. Kamar cukup luas,  harga sangat masuk akal dengan kualitas seperti ini, service memuaskan, ramah dan sangat membantu, pertahankan kinerja nya

chunks.summary: Very nice hotel since it was the newest hotel in town.
chunks.text: Very nice hotel since it was the newest hotel in town. Room was spacious, amenities are nice, staff are very friendly and attentive. Looking great on the rooftop bar, nice "semi indoor" pool although its not big. The food was delicious and the restaurant have a very calm ambience. Will recommend this hotel to anyone looking to visit Banyuwangi. Some tip: since its not really in the middle of the city (can't really walk for food/shopping), if you bring your own car it would be the best (to cruise around).

chunks.summary: Pertama kali ke hotel ini sebenarnya bulan agustus 2020..dan berlanjut ke bulan bulan berikutnya..
chunks.text:
Pertama kali ke hotel ini sebenarnya bulan agustus 2020..dan berlanjut ke bulan bulan berikutnya.. Hotelnya luar biasa untuk sekelas daerah banyuwangi.. View belakang dan depan hotelnya bagus banget.. Kamarnya cukup luas dan nyaman banget, hampir setiap kesana dapat kamar yang ada balkonnya dan ini sangat menyenangkan buat saya.. Duduk di balkon sambil menikmati pemandangan
 dan angin adalah hal yang selalu saya lakukan.. Fasilitas hotel ini juga yang jadi pertimbangan untuk selalu balik kesini.. Gym, sauna dan pool nya.. Membuat saya ga cuma bengong ketika ada waktu kosong tapi ga ada kegiatan.. Yang terakhir rooftop cafenya.. Kita bs santai nongkrong atau ketemu rekanan bisnis disini.. Tempatnya cozy dan asyik

chunks.summary: Highly recommended place with awesome view, tasty food, clean room, friendly staff especially miss Kety.
chunks.text: Highly recommended place with awesome view, tasty food, clean room, friendly staff especially miss Kety. Staycation in this hotel is the right choice for short weekend family gateway when this pandemic, because almost everything is provided with many facilities and health protocols held well. Will stay for my next staycation.. please give us your update news especially for your room rate promotion. Keep success and maintain your quality!

chunks.summary: Hotel ini sangat sy recoment..
chunks.text:
Hotel ini sangat sy recoment.. hotel baru.. staff nya baik dan ramah.. Ada tmpt gym nya.. Satu satu nya hotel di banyuwangi yg punya tmpt gym.. Ada sauna room nya.. Bfast nya enak.. Ranjang twin nya gede. Bisa di gabungkan
Pokoknya mantappp

chunks.summary: Menghabiskan malam Minggu bersama keluarga menjadi lebih indah dan aman selama era pandemi covid.
chunks.text: Menghabiskan malam Minggu bersama keluarga menjadi lebih indah dan aman selama era pandemi covid. Kamar yang modern ditambah pemandangan yang indah di sisi timur, bisa melihat pantai dan sunrise ketika pagi hari. Menikmati malam Minggu dengan sajian barbekyu di rooftoop beserta alunan live musik. Kolam renang yang nyaman untuk anak dan tempat gym yang sehat untuk berolahraga. Mantap dan recomended untuk kalian yang ingin beristirahat dengan nyaman. Terima kasih kokoon hotel atas pelayanannya

chunks.text: Third time staying at this hotel. The room was clean and the family room is really great for families with 2kids. The staff was very friendly, i like their breakfast too with amazing view from the restaurant.

chunks.text: the view behind the hotel. little bit expensive

chunks.summary: After another hotel stay, we moved to this hotel.
chunks.text: After another hotel stay, we moved to this hotel. The highest hotel in Banyuwangi, Kokoon hotel is one of favorite place for stay. They have rooftop with 360° views, and the room can choose ocean or mountain view. I love to stay at high floors. In the morning that you can enjoy the sunrise coming up from behind the island of GOD, Bali. They have sauna that is the first time experienced in Banyuwangi area. Really enjoyed it. The swimming pool at 2nd floor is indoor pool that lil bit cold for me, so just for a while and continue to sauna, uhhhh how is a good life then. Warmest staff at Ijen Restaurant make us really enjoy like a second home, the chef very friendly, chef Bagus, chef Jhon say hi to our table and delivery directly to us, that amazing things! Very rare have it. Waiter and waitress very warm to us. But I forgot the name. Franc the waiter his still remember me as repeater guest in Ijen Restaurant, very appreciated! And also adi at housekeeping team, very friendly. Easy booking by call to Ms.Ayu the sales team make me easy to booking. And also to Ms. Resti at the Reception she's very warm welcome when we checked in. Feels like this hotel as home, very comfortable. Of course will coming back!

chunks.summary: This newly operated hotel is a good choice for our family as we felt secure during this trouble period.
chunks.text: This newly operated hotel is a good choice for our family as we felt secure during this trouble period. All staff are well trained and made us feel very welcome. Keep up the gold standard

chunks.summary: Location was okay, a little bit far from the port but since we travelled by car it was still okay.
chunks.text: Location was okay, a little bit far from the port but since we travelled by car it was still okay. Hotel looked brand new, comfortable and clean. The Family Room beds were great, perfect for family of 4, even for big kids. Pandemic-wise, they had sanitizers everywhere in lobby area and just outside the lifts. All staff wore masks and face shields. The kids got free giant cookies on check-out day so they were very happy. The bathroom and toilet were a bit small. It would be great if they can have more amenities in the room, such as more tissues and bigger rubbish bins. Otherwise, perfect.

chunks.summary: The covid 19 safety protocol was impressing, rooms are sanitized before we arrive.
chunks.text: The covid 19 safety protocol was impressing, rooms are sanitized before we arrive. Foods are delicious, even the buffet breakfast is served, so the food really fresh. I will come back here again in 2021 !!! Thanks to all kind staff !!!

chunks.summary: Transit dari Bali mau ke Surabaya, 1 malam di Family Room Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Transit dari Bali mau ke Surabaya, 1 malam di Family Room Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Nyaman dan bersih kamarnya, viewnya ok. Breakfastnya cukup bervariasi dan enak, serta diambilkan oleh petugas. Untuk fasilitas lain tidak sempat coba. Lain kali pasti kembali lagi ke Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi...

chunks.summary: Roof top bar is spectacular with mountain & ocean just perfect view.
chunks.text: Roof top bar is spectacular with mountain & ocean just perfect view. Cocktail /alcohol selection is good lil bit pricey regarding where you are now :) Pool & Gym are awe. Spa is cutey good enough for you to have treatment you need. Hotel should put little more essential amenities such as lotion , cream  & kit. It is not easy for stranger like me to walk outside and buy things Cuz most are local residential area also far from supermarket ( maybe hotel will consider to have small shop inside hotel provide essential things ) . Overall this hotel are great in package .

chunks.summary: Semalam merasakan hotel yang nyaman di family room.
chunks.text: Semalam merasakan hotel yang nyaman di family room. Kamar menghadap sebelah barat sehingga bisa melihat pemandangan gunung raung dan ijen. Pesan tiket di salah satu website penjualan tiket tanpa breakfast, pas di hotel dapat free breakfast untuk 4 orang "Alhamdulillah", dan masakannya enak. Kolam renang dan gym cukup memuaskan kami,hampir  2 jam anak anak menghabiskan waktu sambil berenang. Kalau ke banyuwangi lagi, kokoon menjadi pilihan yang pertama...terima kasih kokoon.

chunks.summary: This hotel was awesome, clean and nice to stay, the room was excelent, is cozy for me and my wife.

chunks.text: The artistic interior, the super friendliness of the staff, the cleanliness and their awareness for safe procedures during pandemic are the best qualities we found in Kokoon. We love the breakfast though I think they can still add more Western food in their menu. But overall it's a very nice stay and we will be back there for sure!

chunks.summary: Sarapan dengan variasi pilihan yang baik  dan rasa yang memuaskan.
chunks.text: Sarapan dengan variasi pilihan yang baik  dan rasa yang memuaskan. Lokasi dengan pemandangan yang luar biasa.

chunks.summary: Pengalaman menginap yang sangat mengesankan 😊.
chunks.text: Pengalaman menginap yang sangat mengesankan 😊

chunks.summary: Modern room, comfortable king koil bed, wide twin beds, very nice room view, great bathroom, but location a bit far from Ketapang Ferry Port located at southern part of Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Modern room, comfortable king koil bed, wide twin beds, very nice room view, great bathroom, but location a bit far from Ketapang Ferry Port located at southern part of Banyuwangi. Maybe the best hotel room to stay in Banyuwangi.

chunks.summary: Kalau ke Bawi nginepnya di kokoon hotel.
chunks.text: Kalau ke Bawi nginepnya di kokoon hotel. layanan baik banget. Breakfastnya lengkap. Rasa enak semua. anak-anak suka, sudah beberapa kali menginap sni. Recommended?

chunks.summary: Clean room, comfort bed, good food, very very helpfull staff  Will recomend this hotel and definitely will stay again.
chunks.text: Clean room, comfort bed, good food, very very helpfull staff  Will recomend this hotel and definitely will stay again. You should appreciate your staff, they are very proffesional and have good attitude. Western menu at breakfast is so so, not so special, but indonesian menu is very good. We ordered room service and it took forever.

chunks.summary: Nice hotel, clean, large parking in basement, near with Ketapang Harbour.
chunks.text: Nice hotel, clean, large parking in basement, near with Ketapang Harbour

chunks.summary: Stayed for one night and realize that we need a couple more nights to cover great experience of Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Stayed for one night and realize that we need a couple more nights to cover great experience of Banyuwangi. The hotel staffs are very nice, very polite and they always greet us by name. Hotel is clean, room is beautiful, very well designed and food are delicious. You must try their grilled rib. Thank you mas Gufron for your impecable assistance in restaurant. Definitely will come back in the future.

chunks.summary: Sempatkan waktu Anda untuk menginap di hotel Kokoon apabila singgah di Banyuwangi.
chunks.text:
Sempatkan waktu Anda untuk menginap di hotel Kokoon apabila singgah di Banyuwangi. Lokasinya yang strategis, Rooftop Lounge nya yang kece, serta panoramic deck-nya yang menawarkan pemandangan Selat Bali dan Gunung Ijen pastinya membuat pengalaman menginap Anda tidak terlupakan ... Untuk menu hidangannya, saya merekomendasikan nasi goreng Ijen serta Omelette-nya. Otentik dan pastinya enak~

Last but not least, disini koneksi internetnya super kenceng lho. Bintang ***** ga ada obatnya!!!

chunks.summary: When I first come to Kokoon Banyuwangi, I saw that this Hotel was ready for Covid 19 protocol.
chunks.text: When I first come to Kokoon Banyuwangi, I saw that this Hotel was ready for Covid 19 protocol. I feel safe because I went to this hotel with my wife and my 4 years old son. The restaurant staff was very helpful and friendy. I think you can imagine how take a breakfast with an superactive boys. Fortunately, the waitress can help us. Thanks god. I can't explain how I feel when stay at Kokoon for 6 days. I will take a note from The Eagle's Song (Hotel California). You can check out anytime you like but you can never leave

chunks.summary: Kokoon hotel merupakan hotel baru di Banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Kokoon hotel merupakan hotel baru di Banyuwangi. Namun, memiliki SDM yg profesional.. harga kamar terjangkau, menu makannya enak apalagi bbq di rooftopnya.. Pantas dengan harganya.. Informasi disampaikan dengan jelas, maklum krn baru jadi masih belum pernah blusak blusuk ke hotelnya

chunks.summary: Great service, great hospitality, and good breakfast.
chunks.text: Great service, great hospitality, and good breakfast. Come back again next time

chunks.summary: nice place,nice views both sides.
chunks.text:
nice place,nice views both sides. staff pleasant, property clean. however, junior suite is too expensive. to be improved:
no doorman at arrival (day off!)
no welcome drink
menu only in indonesian
little choice dishes and on top some not available
some staff not wearing mask

conclusion: good but not ready for foreign tourists. breakfast good with large choice and efficient service.

chunks.summary: Perjalanan bisnis kali ini sangat menyenangkan ketika saya menginap di hotel kokoon banyuwangi.
chunks.text: Perjalanan bisnis kali ini sangat menyenangkan ketika saya menginap di hotel kokoon banyuwangi. Fasilitas hotel yang lengkap, Kamar yang bersih dan cozy dengan harga yang bagus untuk hotel bintang 4 pelayanan yang super duper great banget breakfast yang oke karyawan hotel yang ramah dan sih. Tidak menyesal menginap di kokoon Banyuwangi selama 3 malam. Recommended hotel dengan pelayanan dan fasilitas prima.

chunks.summary: liburan era pandemi akhirnya milih staycation di kokoon, nyaman banget !
chunks.text: liburan era pandemi akhirnya milih staycation di kokoon, nyaman banget ! makanan enak dan staffnya baik + ramah, kalo ke bwi bakalan nginep sini lagi 😍

chunks.summary: Kamar bagus.
chunks.text: Kamar bagus. Swimming pool kecil

chunks.summary: What a place to stay in Banyuwangi, especially the unique and the cozy one.
chunks.text: What a place to stay in Banyuwangi, especially the unique and the cozy one. Complete with cultural touch and modern atmosphere that make us want to go back one day. There is also a 360 panoramic view on top of the hotel that is accessable for all the guests to enjoy between a mountain view or sea view

chunks.summary: Hotelnya bagus, suka sama interior dan taman di sekitar lobby.
chunks.text: Hotelnya bagus, suka sama interior dan taman di sekitar lobby.

chunks.summary: Staf ramah dan suasana hotel menyenangkan, terima kasih.
chunks.text: Staf ramah dan suasana hotel menyenangkan, terima kasih.

chunks.summary: I was stay from August 31st - Sept 4th 2020.
chunks.text: I was stay from August 31st - Sept 4th 2020. Thanks a lots for the front line people, from security, reception,restaurant and housekeeping. Excellence service, very clean hotel, delicious food and drink, and very very nice view booth sea view and mountain view. See U again in the next business trip.

chunks.summary: Staycation kali ini seru sekali,perjalanan menggunakan kereta api,dan dilanjut dengan ojek online menambah pengalaman perjalanan yang luar biasa,menjatuhkan pilihan di hotel ini adalah pilihan tepat,pelayanan yang begitu ramah di fo nya sampe diantar ke kamar oleh karyawannya (maaf bu,gak sempet nanya nama,tapi anda terbaik,salam kenal dari saya),poolnya berasa milik sendiri(ya iyalah,berenang jam 7 malam!😅),kamar yang luar biasa,tempat tidur yang nyaman(bisa mengatasi low back pain saya😅),rooftrop yang keren,dan saat itu lagi ada promo all u can eat seafood(maafkan saya tidak bisa review dikarenakan tidak mencoba),well,terbaik untuk staycation dengan pasangan ataupun dengan anak2,someday i'll be back😍,oh iya,pas cek out,saya juga dapet gift snack untuk menemani perjalanan saya didalam kereta,thanks kokoon hotel banyuwangi😎.

chunks.summary: 발리가는 중에 묵은 항구근처의 호텔인 데, 지은 지 얼마 안되어 정말 깨끗하고 안락함.
chunks.text: 발리가는 중에 묵은 항구근처의 호텔인 데, 지은 지 얼마 안되어 정말 깨끗하고 안락함. 조식도 훌륭하였으며, 주변 경관도 상당함. 강추합니다.

chunks.summary: Fasilitas lengkap, rooftop oke, bisa liat pegunungan dan laut.
chunks.text: Fasilitas lengkap, rooftop oke, bisa liat pegunungan dan laut. Kolam renang disukai anak anak. Free Sauna. Makanan enak. Staf ramah. Pengalaman baru menginap di tempat baru. Banyuwangi memang tiada duanya. Kita pasti akan kembali.

chunks.summary: Kamarnya cukup besar, bersih dan nyaman.
chunks.text: Kamarnya cukup besar, bersih dan nyaman. Pemandangan dari balkon kamar maupun roof top juga bagus. Fasilitas gym dan sauna nya juga bagus. Makanannya enak.. Pertama kali menginap selama 5 malam.. Luar biasa

chunks.summary: Akomodasi sesuai yang tertera, tempat nyaman luas bersih serta menyenangkan senang sekali menginap di sini.
chunks.text: Akomodasi sesuai yang tertera, tempat nyaman luas bersih serta menyenangkan senang sekali menginap di sini.

chunks.summary: We had one night stay last weekend for my husband's birthday.
chunks.text: We had one night stay last weekend for my husband's birthday. Smooth check in process, nice staffs, big clean room though it's just their standard type. It's in 11th floor, came with great landscape. And surprisingly they knocked on the door, handed us slice cake for the birthday day boy😜, fyi, we didn't ask for the cake, nice huh? We had coffee with awesome night city view, didn't try the pool so not much to tell we're just too lazy 😃😃 Don't forget to bring the slippers home, they're cutie Oh the front lady even gave us cookie as a goodbye present It is worth the money

chunks.summary: Sangat menyenangkan dengan pelayanan yang baik, makan yang enak dan tempat yang bagus, rasanya pengen menginap terus disana.
chunks.text: Sangat menyenangkan dengan pelayanan yang baik, makan yang enak dan tempat yang bagus, rasanya pengen menginap terus disana. Mau check-out masih di beri souvenir lagi, terima kasih kokoon hotel.

chunks.summary: Kebersihannya sangat bersih , krywn yg ramah , proses c in cepat.
chunks.text: Kebersihannya sangat bersih , krywn yg ramah , proses c in cepat

chunks.summary: I was staying 10-14 august 2020 for a business trip.
chunks.text: I was staying 10-14 august 2020 for a business trip. First of all, you won't say NO to their food! We had have happy tummy for the coffee snacks, and lunch. Hotel that serves sushi during a workshop coffee break is the best! Secondly, during those times, I had my time to try their facilities from the extensive gym, pool, and sauna. The gym is good except they don't have person who clean the facilities after it's being used. I need to clean it by myself once I want to use it the other day. Especially during this pandemic, I think this servise is necessary. Also, I need to operate sauna by my own once, because it wasn't ON when I wanted to use, and there was no people except a spa lady who cannot operate it either. Lucky I had my phone and thanks to their internet: google always help. Third and the most important, I love the way Kokoon team treats their guest personally. I used to drink lots of water everyday. Day one on a breakfast, I asked them to bring me a bottle of water instead of glass, as I don't want to go back and forth to the water container for my breakfast. Thing I do really appreciate was they brought me a bottle of water, everyday, for the rest of my breakfast during my stay, even without being asked. Bravo! The team of F&B definitely my favorite. If I'm not mistaken about the name: Gofur. He was asking our opinion everytime after the food was prepared. Unless sugar is the way they show their sweetness, I prefer my food salty and spicy. Thanks, Kokoon. You are on my recommendation list! 🖤

I was stayed yesterday in room 1126, for held my bestfriend birthday, i feel the comfort of that big place and nice ambience from my arrival and good check in Experience, Thanks to Mrs.Siska at the front desk who served me better and the best, and Good Room and nice room is prepare for me, 
And dont forget so very very thankfull for Mrs.Ayu Dewi that give my special treatment and that room for me,and thank you for the Cake too @Mrs Ayu Dewi,and im very recommend this place to other because of the good service and the big , comfort and nice place to visit :)).

chunks.summary: sehari mencoba menginap dihotel ini memberi pengalaman baru dibanyuwangi, bisa memilih view kamar menghadap pegunungan atau laut, kamar yang sangat nyaman dan bagus, para karyawan hotel yang sangat ramah dan murah senyum.
chunks.text: sehari mencoba menginap dihotel ini memberi pengalaman baru dibanyuwangi, bisa memilih view kamar menghadap pegunungan atau laut, kamar yang sangat nyaman dan bagus, para karyawan hotel yang sangat ramah dan murah senyum. ada fasilitas rooftop jadi bisa memandang banyuwangi di ketinggian plus sunset di sore hari..lokasi hotel yang cukup strategis mudah dijangkau dengan kendaraan umum dan pribadi..adapun sedikit kekurangan untuk fasilitas kolam renang airnya kurang mengalir dan sebaiknya diberikan lampu2, tanaman agar lebih hidup dan perbanyak fasilitas hand sanitizer terutama di lift

chunks.summary: Hotel baru yang bersih, staff ramah, hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi dan ada fasilitas rooftop yg bisa lihat banyuwangi dari ketinggian.
chunks.text:
Hotel baru yang bersih, staff ramah, hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi dan ada fasilitas rooftop yg bisa lihat banyuwangi dari ketinggian. pesan kamar conecting room, sayang belum ada yang sea view, jadi dapet yg mountain view aja. ada fasilitas gym, sauna, dan indoor swimpool.. nongkrong di lobby hotel / rooftop jadi pilihan tepat,
sedikit yang kurang adalah pilihan menu breakfast nya kurang, next bisa ditambah yaaa.. overall nyaman staycation disini :-)

chunks.summary: new hotel, the view from rooftop is so nice have kids facilities clean great hospitality.
